Since Elizabeth doesn't host private fundraisers or spend her time on the phone asking rich donors for money, we need people like you to do their part to keep this campaign running.

Just a movement built on grassroots donors. And with your help, Pennsylvania can have a powerful impact on this movement.**

[**Will you be one of the 124? Yang Gang --

Our movement is powered by individuals like you who decided to stand up and forge a new way forward into the 21st century.

**When they said Andrew was a longer than long shot, you said, “Think again.”**

You are the changemakers and patriots who aren’t sitting by and watching as pundits and politicians dictate how our democracy should work. You are taking a stand and working to make our democracy work for us, not just for the rich and powerful.

**And now is your chance to go on the record as one of our top supporters and members of this movement.

[ Get your name on the record as an official supporter before we file our Q4 FEC report this month. Contribute $10 or more now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19251?t=8&akid=4353%2E377263%2E1Z_B3R)**

When history looks back at this moment in our country, you will go down as **a member of one of the most powerful forces in American politics -- the Yang Gang.**

Andrew and our team are proud to be fighting alongside you for the future.

Some of your names are already accompanying Andrew on our Iowa tour bus.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 4 facts House Democrats wish they could change
body:
No matter what House Democrats may claim—and no matter how many times they try to change their story—they can’t run away from the facts. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d982100c1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 9, 2019
---
| | |
# 4 facts House Democrats wish they could change

**No matter what House Democrats** may claim—and no matter how many times they try to change their story—they can’t run away from the facts.

**Chalk up today** as yet another lost day for Congress, as Democrat leaders scramble to justify why they’ve all but scrapped any legislative priorities for the year. But no matter how hard they try to spin their narrative to the media, change their argument, or implement a rigged process, at least one thing has been consistent throughout these impeachment hearings.

**The facts** haven’t changed. And that’s bad news for the do-nothing obstructionists:
1. **There is no evidence of wrongdoing by the President.** Despite weeks of hearings, Democrats have not produced a single piece of evidence showing that President Trump committed any criminal, impeachable offense whatsoever.

2. **Ukraine has said there was no pressure.** President Zelensky and other Ukrainian officials have explained repeatedly that they never felt pushed.

3. **Lethal aid to Ukraine _wouldn’t even exist_ without President Trump**. For all the Democrats’ posturing about national security and aid, it was President Trump who made the decision to provide Ukraine with lethal aid. The Obama Administration had rejected doing so for years.

4. **This is an unfair, unprecedented impeachment stunt.** House Democrats have continually broken with precedent and implemented an unfair “investigation” in a desperate attempt to ram impeachment through Congress.

**Of course** , Democrats have changed their story so many times when it comes to what they are actually accusing President Trump of, it’s hard to keep up. As a result, American families are simply left scratching their heads, asking, “What was this all for?”

**Imagine all that** could have been accomplished had House Democrats worked this hard on things that actually matter to American citizens. In addition to the soaring Trump Economy—which is lowering unemployment and raising wages across the income spectrum—by now your medicine prices could be even lower, your border a little more secure, and the infrastructure in your state a little stronger and safer.

**Sadly, we’ll never know**.

[JUST IN: President Trump weighs in on the Justice Dept. Inspector General report.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a1279100f8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **WATCH: First Lady visits Children’s National Hospital**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e81f0ee95&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **First Lady Melania Trump** spread some holiday cheer on Friday, visiting patients, family members, and medical staff at Children’s National Hospital in Washington, D.C.

**This nearly 70-year tradition** dates back to Elizabeth “Bess” Truman. During this year’s visit, the First Lady stopped by the hospital’s short-stay and surgical units, then made her way to a playroom where she participated in a Christmas craft-making project. Next came a Christmas book-reading for children at the hospital.

[First Lady Melania Trump Makes Annual Holiday Visit to Children's Hospital](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e988646f7b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
| **First Lady Melania Trump greets 11 year-old patient Declan McCahan before reading to patients and families during a Christmas visit to Children’s National Hospital in Washington, D.C.** | December 6, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a230fe45a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a1e9d29491&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ad45d328cc)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Last Week in Review
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Last week was a busy week for our campaign!

We started with big news as Harris County Commissioner Jack Cagle joined fellow Commissioner Steve Radack by **endorsing our campaign**!

Then, we began celebrating the Christmas season with holiday parties hosted by the Harris County Republican Party, Councilman Michael Kubosh, Buffie Ingersoll and the Village Republican Women!

Meanwhile, our volunteer army was hard at work, knocking on thousands of doors to get our message out.

And on Friday evening, I [joined Larry Elder on his nationally syndicated radio show](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=6075a9ab42a14cf7bc12b9c2ef7d8aee&_e=IKJR9B4KbEY9ebJQotJtTrK85sB5wzX8NHPN7GljZYhbKnIBe8uAa2In31VYy8GCRC2jZJkERh0flf_uxtxQTyy3WfuKzNOPiY6_ksNilPfB327_wgqcnnfIeddV-uydf1WwjvBC4LSSXaXIRXFKHixqF3zB215FwYlnoKypkaM5XR4kMG--5ojqfQCWhiqMIjuL0dV6EKGjdb-izNTaL8bKf7bijHveWXE-_UOTcJgxUKmWlk1pVGiPmGto-drCF1mwMSOQopXFultY97Ex_A0ftnS-GflC3CFFlu_91AA%3D) to discuss my background and some of the issues facing our district and our country.

Friend, we need to keep this momentum going! We need your support more than ever. [**Will you join Team Hunt by hosting an event, block-walking your neighborhood or reaching out to your friends?**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=6075a9ab42a14cf7bc12b9c2ef7d8aee&_e=IKJR9B4KbEY9ebJQotJtTj-LlMyB2bLCjr4ACan6a9bOF74u1id_XJtIw924Q4atCFPVA4NquWAserKkSOzELSQJy-YCjb87w4m2L5b8_E8Kqo1ubfEAtTLPooC65xRDieqd5IPLsflJnnbqsYEz9DcPdEcQxKOGy_29NwZi1p39WIB6yRPpY-vdm7KV29Xfg7pjNp0mDgodvQaeWzWZM1evIoU8Wyur1EFU-iNgSZGvTmUOurzgx6hC3djbKSkr1HaaI-c0fklceIRUGAVeSg%3D%3D)

Thank you for your continued support and friendship.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

name: Booker HQ
subject: Let's talk about how close Cory is to qualifying for the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, We're in the final stretch to qualify for the December debate. Here's what's standing in the way of Cory having a spot on stage: a handful of survey responses. The DNC requires each candidate to have four polls showing support at or above 4% -- we've had two recently with Cory at 3%. Here's what that likely translates to:_If just a couple more voters in each of those polls had said they support Cory,**they would count as qualifiers.**_ That's how close Cory is to making it on that stage. We just need a teensy, tiny bump in the polls to earn a spot. And if we can amplify our message in these next few days, we can make it happen --**[will you rush a donation to help our campaign reach our $500,000 ads budget goal right now?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191209_BHQ_20191209-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** As of today, not one person of color will be among the candidates on stage later this month. This primary started out as the most diverse field in history, and now we're in danger of losing that -- before any voters have weighed in. It doesn't have to be that way. Let's all give this one big push to get Cory on that stage. [**Make a donation right now -- it 'll go directly to spreading our message more widely in these critical days.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191209_BHQ_20191209-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191209_BHQ_20191209-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. The American people know better: CNN released a poll saying six in 10 Americans believe Trump does NOT deserve a second term - but we haven't heard from you. If this can be confirmed, it would be HUGE for Democrats, so we're conducting our own Trump Approval poll. But we 're still 26 responses short in 34223 to reach statistical significance, and the poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight.** Tell us now: | | Does Donald Trump deserve a second term? | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, . | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic Governors Association are not tax deductible.

name: Tina Smith
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I wanted to send you a quick note to show my appreciation. My hope is that you will take a moment to read it.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191209-ty?refcode=em191209-ty&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team -- I'm not asking today, just thanking.

Thank you for all you have done and continue to do for our campaign. I wouldn't be in this fight if it wasn't for folks like you chipping in whatever you can afford, volunteering your time, and taking action when it's needed most.

That's why I wanted to send you this quick note to show my appreciation.

Democrats can only retake the Senate if we hold strong in Minnesota, and you're doing your part to make it happen each time you give in response to one of these messages from me or my team.

Because of you, we are on our way to closing out 2019 stronger than I ever could have imagined. If we continue at this pace through the rest of the month, I know we will roll into 2020 in a position to win re-election here in Minnesota and defend our values in Washington.

One last thing: It's so important to me that this campaign really is powered by the people, and the incredible support you've shown me so far proves that. So, thanks again.

Yours,

-- Tina | [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191209-ty?refcode=em191209-ty&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=yes")

| | **Tomorrow I 'm holding our First in the Nation Town hall here in Iowa to discuss Iowa's role in the nominating process. **
[Donate Today >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a0/3eb3e2fc/68b70f60/744d13ec/3882642041/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Donate+Today+gtgt&utm_campaign=20191209_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191209_em_fr_b4_castro_all") With a party as diverse as ours,
With a country as diverse as ours,
When choosing our leaders, we need to make sure the voices that get amplified the loudest also represent that diversity. **I 'm looking forward to the discussion.** It's also worth examining the process for choosing our nominee, when we started with a diverse field of candidates and now the next debate stage currently lacks any person of color. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a0/3eb3e2fc/68b70f60/744d13d1/3882642041/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191209_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191209_em_fr_b4_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a0/3eb3e2fc/68b70f60/744d13d0/3882642041/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191209_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191209_em_fr_b4_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a0/3eb3e2fc/68b70f60/744d13df/3882642041/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191209_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191209_em_fr_b4_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: You're Invited!
body:
No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-naikyk-ahkdjtlkr-x/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-naikyk-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,I'd like to officially invite you to a few upcoming events. Even if you can't make it in person _(and I hope you can -- they'll be a lot of fun),_ you can still support my campaign by clicking on the link below the event itself.Thanks - I hope to see you there!
### **Tuesday, December 10th - Pewaukee, WI**
* Join us at VJS Construction in Pewaukee for a fundraising reception for Scott Fitzgerald

[RSVP - Pewaukee Event](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-naikyk-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Donate - Pewaukee Event](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-naikyk-ahkdjtlkr-j/)
### **Sunday, December 15th - Joel and Rebecca Kleefisch Home, Sullivan, WI**
* Join us for a Packer Party and wild game party! Watch the Packers devour the Bears, then devour some Wisconsin black bear yourself (or alligator, or wild boar)
* Hosted by Joel and Rebecca Kleefisch

[RSVP - Sullivan/Kleefisch Event](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-naikyk-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [Donate - Sullivan/Kleefisch Event](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-naikyk-ahkdjtlkr-i/)
### **Monday, December 16th - Tommy Thompson Event, Whitewater, WI**
* Join us at Willow Brook Golf Course in Whitewater for a special event featuring Gov. Tommy Thompson

[RSVP - Whitewater Event](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-naikyk-ahkdjtlkr-u/) [Donate - Whitewater Event](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-naikyk-ahkdjtlkr-o/) Thanks again!Scott FitzgeraldP.S. Even if you can't make it in person, I hope you'll click the "Donate" link below the RSVP to help make the events a success! -Fitz

It’s official: Nancy Pelosi has introduced legal Articles of Impeachment against President Trump. If the vote passes Pelosi’s Democrat controlled House, President Trump could be removed from office.

name: Christina Finello
subject: I’ll be honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter \-- I’ll be honest with you: when I can get to people and have the chance to tell them what I’m all about one-on-one, I win over their support. So my strategy is to continue hustling on the ground to ensure we’re meeting with the voters we need to win. I decided to run because too many families in our district struggle to pay their bills, make ends meet, and take care of their families, all while our government \-- specifically my opponent Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick \-- is doing almost nothing to keep big banks, insurance companies, and drug companies from making it even harder. Just recently, The American Action Network launched a targeted $7 million advertising blitz to protect Fitzpatrick and some of the other most vulnerable GOP members like him because they know he cannot win re-election without outside donors lifting him up. My campaign is funded entirely by real people who believe families in southeastern PA deserve better \-- but I can’t take on powerful dark money donors on my own. I need you with me. Our next FEC filing deadline is at the end of the month, and this is our chance to prove the strength of our grassroots campaign, but right now, we’re still a ways off from our goal. If you are ready to help me flip PA-01 in 2020, then pitch in $25 or whatever you can right now. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12714954/131174556/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDkxMTllMS01ZTFiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ns4trahdfVRaOU79h5hdS3thOpDddTFeULLqTB5YUvM=&emci=f39119e1-5e1b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f49119e1-5e1b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)

Peter, We’ve received some big news in this race that has exposed the record of my opponent in the Democratic primary.

**Shannon Hutcheson voted Republican in a critical year for Obamacare, donated to Republicans, worked on behalf of corporations hurting working people, represented private prisons that are facilitating family separation, and protected a prison guard who sexually assaulted migrant women in detention. Now, ****Hutcheson is challenging me for the Democratic nomination.**

[**Today, more than ever, I need your support so we can win this crucial race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12714955/131174557/-930450309?refcode=em121019&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDkxMTllMS01ZTFiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ns4trahdfVRaOU79h5hdS3thOpDddTFeULLqTB5YUvM=)

I have spent my career fighting for people as a public servant, first as a public school teacher and union organizer, and then as a civil rights lawyer, fighting for at-risk students, mistreated workers, immigrant families and people looking for housing.

**I don’t think the distinction could be more clear.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12714956/131174558/-930450309?refcode=em121019&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDkxMTllMS01ZTFiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ns4trahdfVRaOU79h5hdS3thOpDddTFeULLqTB5YUvM=)
**We need someone who will bring a real alternative to the GOP’s anti-worker and anti-immigrant agenda — not further it.**

When I was an Assistant City Attorney for the City of Austin, I sued to strike down Texas’ Senate Bill 4, an anti-immigrant, “show-me-your-papers” bill. When I ran for Congress in 2018, I successfully fought to update the Texas Democratic Party platform — to include a strong opposition to private immigration jails.

Here’s the thing: Hutcheson has been able to raise a lot of money because of her wealthy corporate connections. She hopes to cover up her record as a corporate attorney with TV ads and direct mail. This makes it even more important that we build a massive grassroots movement for political change.

**[This is our moment. I need your support now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12714957/131174559/-930450309?refcode=em121019&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDkxMTllMS01ZTFiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ns4trahdfVRaOU79h5hdS3thOpDddTFeULLqTB5YUvM=)**

Fighting for you,
Mike Siegel

clean_body: Peter, We’ve received some big news in this race that has exposed the record of my opponent in the Democratic primary. Shannon Hutcheson voted Republican in a critical year for Obamacare, donated to Republicans, worked on behalf of corporations hurting working people, represented private prisons that are facilitating family separation, and protected a prison guard who sexually assaulted migrant women in detention. Now, Hutcheson is challenging me for the Democratic nomination. = I have spent my career fighting for people as a public servant, first as a public school teacher and union organizer, and then as a civil rights lawyer, fighting for at-risk students, mistreated workers, immigrant families and people looking for housing. I don’t think the distinction could be more clear. = We need someone who will bring a real alternative to the GOP’s anti-worker and anti-immigrant agenda — not further it. When I was an Assistant City Attorney for the City of Austin, I sued to strike down Texas’ Senate Bill 4, an anti-immigrant, “show-me-your-papers” bill. When I ran for Congress in 2018, I successfully fought to update the Texas Democratic Party platform — to include a strong opposition to private immigration jails. Here’s the thing: Hutcheson has been able to raise a lot of money because of her wealthy corporate connections. She hopes to cover up her record as a corporate attorney with TV ads and direct mail. This makes it even more important that we build a massive grassroots movement for political change. = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Scott Cooper
subject: Semper Fidelis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Cooper for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12722386/131232541/861128008?refcode=logo&amount=50&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDIwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTYxNzRiYi03MjFiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RwDSks6Rw5UtMfonz63MLL1maZK3MiSczbTi8AdaP_I=)
---
| | Friends,

On December 2nd the North Carolina Superior Court ruled that the newly drawn maps generated in November by the state legislature will be the maps used for the 2020 congressional elections. With these new district maps, I have been drawn out of the 2nd Congressional District and am now a resident of the 4th Congressional District, which is represented by David Price, an incredible public servant and truly one North Carolina’s finest statesmen.

Our campaign wasn’t about simply getting elected. It was about ensuring my family, friends, and neighbors would be represented by someone who shares our values, which Congressman Price does. Therefore we are suspending our campaign, filled with gratitude for your support over the last eight months.

I believe that we had a clear path to unseating Representative George Holding and working in Washington on behalf of our fellow North Carolinians. But as I learned from many years in the Marine Corps, no good plan survives first contact, and one must always be clear-eyed about the facts on the ground.

I’m grateful to all of you for your belief in me. As I said many times, this campaign was at its core about an idea – the notion that we all must contribute to our communities and our country, in every chapter of our lives; that we don’t have the luxury of being apathetic or cynical; and that citizenship isn’t a spectator sport.

I decided to run for Congress because I saw that many of our fellow North Carolinians seemed to have lost faith in the political process, and no longer believed that there are good people who will be public servants of integrity – people who will be true leaders. The campaign was a part of my effort to change that perception, and my life’s work will continue to be the fulfillment of that idea.

From Louisburg to Lillington, from Raleigh to Rocky Mount, from Holly Springs to Smithfield, I came to know many of you like old friends, and you never ceased to inspire and invigorate me (and also challenge me on every topic under the sun).

This is not the end of my service. My entire life has been dedicated to serving my country. I still believe in electing people who share our values of integrity, dedication, and service. I intend to spend the coming months working hard to help many of my fellow North Carolina Democrats win their elections, from the reelections of Governor Roy Cooper and Attorney General Josh Stein to Democrats running for our General Assembly. And, I am all too aware that there will once again be new congressional maps for 2022, maps that will likely include an additional seat for North Carolina and that promise new opportunities.

Thank you for being part of this action of citizenship. I often told a story about the most significant election of my life, one that took place in the autumn of 2005, when I helped to secure polling sites in Iraq. Many of you remember people posing for photos with their purple ink-stained thumbs signifying that they had voted. For most it was the first free election of their lives.

I know how fortunate I am to live in a country where we just assume that we will enjoy the right of the franchise.

**I pray that we can remember in this moment that we are more alike than different, that we are citizens of a country of shared ideals, and that we owe each other our respect, as long as our character merits respect.**

I look forward to seeing all of you in the coming months, perhaps on the campaign trail for a North Carolina Democrat. As I reminded you often, remember that you can’t wring your hands and roll up your sleeves at the same time. This is a moment to roll up our sleeves.

Semper Fidelis,

Scott

---
|
---

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: The Fight for Quality Healthcare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY COMMITTEE TO ELECT STEVE SISOLAK
body:
Dear Friend,
When I ran for Governor, I promised to fight for quality healthcare for all Nevadans - with no penalties for pre-existing conditions. **Access to affordable healthcare is a fundamental right, and I will continue to block attempts to restrict that right for any Nevadan.**
My administration has made great strides in expanding Nevada's healthcare offerings. And, we created a Patient Protection Commission to develop a long-term blueprint that protects accessibility and holds down costs.
The **big pharmaceutical companies and the insurance industry, however, have endless resources and continue to fight us at every turn**. Their relentless pursuit of profits places every Nevadan in jeopardy of paying more for essential care and prescription drugs or, even worse, losing coverage completely.
**I will never stop fighting for the well-being of Nevada residents. But to continue this vital effort, I need your help and your financial support. **

_[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/gCuHOYIgy3MJC2YQxd1_nCRj_Hrv7c1Qytv84J7juGE=/WKsKtp7TbLwwJthelyojsNXbfYP8M34isKrRFdOkFx0=?amount=10)_
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/gCuHOYIgy3MJC2YQxd1_nCRj_Hrv7c1Qytv84J7juGE=/WKsKtp7TbLwwJthelyojsNXbfYP8M34isKrRFdOkFx0=?amount=25)
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/gCuHOYIgy3MJC2YQxd1_nCRj_Hrv7c1Qytv84J7juGE=/WKsKtp7TbLwwJthelyojsNXbfYP8M34isKrRFdOkFx0=?amount=50)
As your Governor, I am totally committed to quality, affordable healthcare and prescription drug coverage for all Nevadans. Thank you in advance for your help - and contribution!
All my best,

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY COMMITTEE TO ELECT STEVE SISOLAK
---

Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
P.O. Box 850
Las Vegas NV 89125 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/gCuHOYIgy3MJC2YQxd1_nCRj_Hrv7c1Qytv84J7juGE=/6BILO_3itfb5t7cj_5IGNcLBlRVLyBcaQG4rHorZfsc=).

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: Why thousands of people are already stepping up to support MJ's campaign to take on Senator Cornyn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Texans know what it will take to win.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890915/7f51f7bc/4a45eea4/4ef0f8e9/2673551114/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
Peter,

**MJ is leading the pack to take on Senator Cornyn!** Why? Because Texans know that it's going to take a tried and true fighter to win this race, and MJ is _literally_ battle-tested.

She faced down the Taliban as they shot at her helicopter in Afghanistan. She took on the Pentagon to allow women to compete for ground combat roles. If anyone can go up against a 17-year D.C. insider propped up by the special interests -- **_and win_** \-- it's MJ.

**But here 's the thing: MJ will only win with this team alongside her. [Will you pitch in now to stand with MJ in the fight to defeat Senator Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890915/7f51f7bc/4a45eea4/4ef0f8e8/2673551114/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191210.1nd__605__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We're less than a year out from the election, and this campaign is already in high gear. MJ has already driven more than 10,000 miles across Texas and proven herself to over _23,000_ donors who have pitched in to support her, all while taking $0 from corporate PACs.

That's because she's relying on grassroots supporters like _you_ to power this campaign.
**Will you chip in now to help MJ take on Senator Cornyn?**

body:

**House Democrats announce abuse of power and obstruction of Congress articles of impeachment against Trump**

Friend,

To Impeach a President who has proven through results, to have one of the most successful presidencies ever, and most importantly, who has done NOTHING wrong, is sheer _**Political Madness!**_

The only abuse of power that is taking place is Democrats trying to steal the election by erasing your vote.

The Do Nothing Democrats no longer want Americans to decide elections, but rather a select group of Liberal Elites in DC.

When we won in 2016, the plot to take you down began. This Impeachment Scam has been 3 years in the making and there is only one force powerful enough to beat them... the American people.

There was _no Quid Pro Quo,_ there was _no bribery,_ there was _no obstruction of justice,_ and there was _no treason._ This is simply a political hit job. They have nothing because I've done nothing wrong. It's so simple: just read the transcripts!

Nancy, Nadler, Schiff and the rest of the Liberal Mob want to DESTROY you. It's up to us to fight back. This is too critical to sit on the sidelines, this is the most important donation you can ever make. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States ** Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915 We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

Friend,
Today Andy Beshear is being sworn in as Kentucky’s new governor, and we are watching with excitement here in West Virginia.
Andy Beshear proved that a Democrat can win in a red state like Kentucky. Our campaign can follow in Andy’s footsteps and secure a win in West Virginia too.
We need 50 people to contribute this week to score another Democratic win in a red state. So I need to ask you :

CONCORD — The New Hampshire Dental Society convened its annual fall/winter meeting on Friday, Nov. 8, and honored state Sen. Jeb Bradley (R-Wolfeboro) with its 2019 Legislative Achievement Award. [Read more](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzA3OTcyNTM5OTg4ODQyNDEwJmM9cTNtOCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDA4ODgyODgmZD1hOXA4bDdu.MJW8eWZUQ7PSP3U0G8owgEE4-MUp4SluoUlmg1xc8eQ)

---
| | December 7
---
Senator‘s bill would make child services its own agency
CONCORD, N.H. (AP) — Lawmakers are considering making New Hampshire‘s child services agency its own department, breaking it away from the health department. The Division for Children, Youth and Families has been facing scrutiny and reforms following several high profile deaths and a report that found it is badly understaffed. Republican Sen. Sharon Carson is proposing a bill to split it from the health department. The proposal is up for a public hearing Tuesday. Carson says the purpose of the bill to provide a more unified approach to administering child protection, foster care, juvenile justice and other child services. [Read More](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzA3OTcyNTM5OTg4ODQyNDEwJmM9cTNtOCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDA4ODgyOTAmZD14N3M5YTJ0.FKJRlEJ1qW7ug6PoQect7apZ-LmFVjg-8sQ0a1K23GU)

---
November 23
Senator Carson, town and state officials celebrate latest phase of Londonderry Rail Trail
LONDONDERRY — The state Commissioner of Transportation, town officials and volunteers celebrated the newest stretch of rail trail in northern Londonderry with a ribbon cutting ceremony Friday afternoon. Attending the ceremony were Londonderry Trailways volunteers, donors, Londonderry state Sen. Sharon Carson, Town Council Chair John Farrell, Town Manager Kevin Smith, Manchester-Boston Regional Airport Director Ted Kitchens, Town Planner Colleen Mailloux, Public Works Director Janusz Czyzowski, Conservation Ranger Glen Aprile and Aviation Museum Executive Director Jeff Rapsis. | Your Turn, NH: Sen. James Gray, Rep. Lynne Ober and Rep. Kenneth Weyler -- We should accept $46 mllion for at-risk youth
---
AS MEMBERS OF the Joint Legislative Fiscal Committee, we are tasked with approving the acceptance and expense of certain funds, including the $46 million federal grant for education our Democratic colleagues tabled recently. It is unfortunate this short-sighted action was taken, putting $46 million in jeopardy that would have helped at-risk youth across the state. New Hampshire has some of the best public schools in the nation and that includes our 28 public charter schools, which allow Granite State children to attend tuition free. Children have the opportunity to learn outside a traditional classroom setting and even focus on specific curricula of interest, including science, mathematics or the arts.

(AP) — Lawmakers are considering making New Hampshire‘s child services agency its own department, breaking it away from the health department. Carson says the purpose of the bill to provide a more unified approach to administering child protection, foster care, juvenile justice and other child services. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Be a Founding Partner of this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there -- whatever I've accomplished in life, I did it with the encouragement, the collaboration, and the generosity of others.
When we started the Wynkoop Brewing Company in 1988, we were a group of beer enthusiasts restoring the J.S. Brown building in downtown Denver, calling in favors from our friends, our families, our colleagues, and anyone else who'd stake a bet on us.
We sold 6,000 pints of beer at pre-Prohibition prices on opening night: 25 cents a pop.
A few years later when we opened the Phantom Brewing Company in Colorado Springs, it wasn't due to the help of big investors. In fact, they all passed on the project. Instead, it was everyday people who each had a little drop of faith and chipped in to become partners in the enterprise.
I just had a beer at Phantom a few weeks ago, everyone, and it tasted just as good as ever.
I've seen the power of partnership and collaboration when it comes to making things happen.
[**Before our first full fundraising quarter of this campaign comes to a close, I 'd like to personally invite you to be a Founding Partner--someone building this campaign from the ground up. Will you chip in $3 or more today?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc31d/2a380d31/3d05b249/f0e22d/1062328538/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTEyMTBfTVdINEhpY2sxXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20191210_MWH4Hick1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
The challenge we're taking on is far from easy.
Cory Gardner has some interested partners, too -- dark money groups connected to the Koch network, shady organizations tied to Mitch McConnell, and of course the national Republican Party. They're his partners--and they'll do everything they can to hang on to this seat.
We're looking for people to get in on the ground floor of our effort to make this the end of Gardner's tenure and McConnell's majority.
A donation isn't just a dollar here -- it's a gesture of faith in the future we can build for Colorado, together. [**Will you become a Founding Partner now?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc31d/2a380d31/3d05b249/f0e22d/1062328538/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTEyMTBfTVdINEhpY2sxXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20191210_MWH4Hick1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you,
John
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc31d/2a380d31/3d05b249/f0e22d/1062328538/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTEyMTBfTVdINEhpY2sxXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20191210_MWH4Hick1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Cory Booker
subject: I feel compelled to speak out about the specific issues that plague communities like mine and so many others across our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
I want to make the case why I belong on the debate stage next week.
| | |
---
| Friend, As the only senator in this race who goes home to a low-income Black and Brown neighborhood, I feel compelled to speak out about the specific issues that plague communities like mine and so many others across our country. That's why in the last debate, I made it a point to talk about the challenges of affordable housing and gentrification -- issues facing millions of Americans that have received far too little attention during this election. **[If you want to keep hearing about these issues, I hope you'll chip in and help send me back to the debate stage next week.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191210_CB_20191210-fr-CB-EM1-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** In past debates, I spoke about my plans to ensure reproductive justice for all and how we'll end child poverty and strengthen union rights. I've also brought the need for serious criminal justice reform and ending the era of mass incarceration to the debate stage -- an issue that many of my opponents haven't seen firsthand. And I've brought attention to the epidemic of violence facing trans women of color, and how we should hold pharmaceutical manufacturers accountable for the opioid crisis that is ravaging our communities. **These issues have not received the coverage they deserve in this primary. If I 'm back on that stage, I will keep speaking out and bringing them to the forefront of the national conversation.** **[That is why I'm asking if you can contribute right now to make sure my voice is on the next debate stage.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191210_CB_20191210-fr-CB-EM1-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I'm going to keep using my platform the best way that I can -- to advocate for justice for all. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191210_CB_20191210-fr-CB-EM1-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name if you agree: It's time for a Blue New Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I believe that a Blue New Deal must be an essential part of any Green New Deal -- helping us fight climate change, protecting our health, and creating good, high-wage union jobs in the process. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b191/45c30650/11d6d5e45/66f8c078/30939728/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
In September, I got a question at a CNN climate crisis town hall from Bren Smith, an ocean farmer from Connecticut. He asked if I'd support a Blue New Deal to restore our oceans, in addition to fighting climate change on land. I said I would, and I meant it.

The world's oceans are in crisis -- our oceans are warming, many of the world's fish stocks are fully exploited or overfished, our coasts are flooding and eroding, and pollution from land is causing dead zones in our waterways and Great Lakes.

**Our safety, public health, food security, and infrastructure are at risk. If we do not act now, things will only get worse, as climate change leads to more severe weather.

I believe that a Blue New Deal must be an essential part of any Green New Deal -- helping us fight climate change, protecting our health, and creating good, high-wage union jobs in the process. That's why today I'm releasing a new plan -- A Blue New Deal For Our Oceans.

[It's time to take bold action on climate change. Add your name if you support rebuilding our Blue Economy, protecting and restoring ocean habitats, and adapting in a climate-changed world.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b191/45c30650/11d6d5e45/66f8c07a/30939728/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU0zNlBfUkxUX0VOVl9FXzIwMTkxMjEwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-bnd?source=EMM36P_RLT_ENV_E_20191210_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Here's how it works.

**-> First, we start by rebuilding our Blue Economy.** Oceans already support millions of jobs and our food system, contributing $304 billion to our national GDP. They also have the potential to be one of our strongest tools in the fight against climate change -- if we harness the potential of the Blue Economy.

As we rapidly transition our economy to 100% clean energy, we must prioritize offshore wind and wave energy. As president, I will work to streamline permitting for offshore renewable energy based on environmental impact assessments and making sure that the communities hosting new developments receive a share of the benefits.

Threats like warming oceans and overfishing have caused the ocean's fish population to fall by 50% over the last 50 years, leading to serious consequences. So we need to rebuild and sustainably manage our fisheries -- supporting up to an additional 500,000 jobs along the way. And my administration will better prepare fishing industries and communities for the impacts of climate change.

**-> Next, we're going to do more to protect and restore our coast and marine habitats.** That starts with fully funding NOAA's Coastal and Estuarine Land Conservation Program to conserve coastal ecosystems. I've also proposed a 21st Century Civilian Conservation Corps, which will hire 10,000 young people and veterans for new job opportunities caring for our natural resources -- including restoration of marine ecosystems.

We'll expand marine protected areas. And we'll build a domestic blue carbon program to help make sure the ocean can continue to naturally store carbon, which helps fight against climate change.

**Plus, we 'll phase out all offshore drilling. It's dangerous for coastal communities, it contributes to climate change, and it needs to come to an end.** I am also committed to leaving no worker behind as we transition to 100% clean energy. The men and women who've worked in the offshore drilling industry will get job training and guaranteed wage and benefit parity if they want to work in new industries, and full financial security if they want to retire.

We'll also reduce ocean trash, hold Big Ag accountable for upstream pollution, and work to build climate smart ports. Finally, I will work with Congress to ratify the Law of the Sea treaty to ensure that we are working with our international partners to collectively manage our oceans.

**-> Finally, we're going to adapt to a changing climate.** As our ocean continues to expand and rise as a result of climate change, we must mitigate the damage that has already been done and prepare for what will only get worse -- sea level rise, storm surges, and extreme weather events. We'll propose quintupling disaster mitigation funding and direct all federal emergency management and coastal management agencies to take a holistic approach to helping communities shelter from increasingly unnatural disasters.

While pre-disaster mitigation is crucial, we'll also have a rigorous post-disaster mitigation plan in place to ensure our most vulnerable populations get the help they need to rebuild their lives after disaster strikes. We'll take climate change into account to reform flood insurance and improve how we manage drought. And we'll fight to fully-fund the Great Lakes Restoration Initiative -- so we can defend the drinking water that 1 in 10 Americans depend on.

Starting on day one of my presidency, I will take bold action to fight climate change -- and that includes harnessing the power of our oceans to be a key part of our solution to the climate crisis. The task before us is significant, but I'm confident that we can meet this challenge together.

[**The future of our planet depends on a healthy ocean -- and we have no more time to waste. Please add your name if you support my plan for a Blue New Deal For Our Oceans.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b191/45c30650/11d6d5e45/66f8c07a/30939728/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU0zNlBfUkxUX0VOVl9FXzIwMTkxMjEwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-bnd?source=EMM36P_RLT_ENV_E_20191210_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

---
| | | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b191/45c30650/11d6d5e45/66f8c07e/30939728/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b191/45c30650/11d6d5e45/66f8c060/30939728/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b191/45c30650/11d6d5e45/66f8c063/30939728/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b191/45c30650/11d6d5e45/66f8c062/30939728/VEsHBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b191/45c30650/11d6d5e45/66f8c065/30939728/VEsHBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b191/45c30650/11d6d5e45/66f8c067/30939728/VEsHBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: OFFICIAL DEMOCRATIC SURVEY (via Team Ben Ray)
subject: still missing your response:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
Will you take my Official Democratic Survey and help Speaker Pelosi and me lead Democrats through this historic chapter? We are truly relying on your feedback to shape our path forward. >>
---
| | **Ben Ray personally asked for your input during this critical time in our country 's history -- _but it looks like he 's still missing your response._ ** ** ** **[**_He needs 10,000 responses before midnight to help shape Democrats ' path forward during this historic moment. He's only 2,964 responses away. Will you take a second to share your feedback with our Democratic leaders? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7bc/18e32a7f/504d71f5/7b22a425/346302196/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191210_em_pet_b1_odsv_all_v2")** -Team Ben Ray **\----------- Forwarded Message -----------**
From: Ben Ray Lujan
Date: Monday, December 9, 2019
Subject: Confirmation #252485 for dpwillis67@gmail.com
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | I just launched the most consequential survey of my entire career. Speaker Pelosi and I need feedback from 10,000 strong Democrats to help us shape our path forward. [**_10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: Speaker Pelosi is now guiding us through one of the most pivotal chapters in our country 's history. Will you take 30 seconds to complete my Official Democratic Survey to help us chart our path forward? We're relying on your feedback more than you know. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7bc/18e32a7f/504d71f5/7b22a425/346302196/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191210_em_pet_b1_odsv_all_v2") ****NAME** : **dpwillis67@gmail.com **RESPONSE:** #252485 **** **** | ********[TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7bc/18e32a7f/504d71f5/7b22a425/346302196/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191210_em_pet_b1_odsv_all_v2")********
---

I need you to know 3 critical things:

1. Speaker Pelosi is now leading us through one of the most pivotal chapters in our country's history.

2. I know she's relying on feedback from our best Democrats to shape our path forward.

3. So I just launched my Official Democratic Survey. I need 10,000 responses before midnight to get an accurate sample size.

[**_I 'm asking because this moment is absolutely critical: Will you take my Official Democratic Survey and help Speaker Pelosi and me lead Democrats through this historic chapter? We are truly relying on your feedback to shape our path forward. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7bc/18e32a7f/504d71f5/7b22a425/346302196/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191210_em_pet_b1_odsv_all_v2")

Thank you for your voice,

Ben Ray Lujan
Assistant Speaker

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7bc/18e32a7f/504d71f5/7b22a4da/346302196/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7bc/18e32a7f/504d71f5/7b22a4db/346302196/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7bc/18e32a7f/504d71f5/7b22a4d8/346302196/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. name: Charles Booker
subject: Let me tell you about our tour across Kentucky so far.
body:
|
---
Folks, I wanted to write to you personally to share how our listening tour across the Commonwealth is going so far. But before I start, I’m going to ask for your support. Your grassroots donations have helped me travel across the Commonwealth this past week, and I’m depending on you to keep this tour going, too. It’s the only way to make sure every Kentuckian gets a seat at the decision-making table. [_**Will you chip in $10 or more to fund our people-powered movement to defeat Mitch McConnell?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12728834/131296147/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191210_a1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTFmMTJmNi04ZTFiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IaOAbheHXTYmjMYWn4u2CwMgdTR6cK_rvvAaRGgLc0k=) Thanks for standing with this movement. Now, here’s what my team and I have been up to: _We started in Covington, where I heard from folks who love our Commonwealth and want to make sure everyone in Kentucky gets their fair share ..._ ___After the event, Sister Janet and I locked arms with the promise that Kentuckians like us will move forward together. With the faith of a mustard seed, we’ll move the biggest mountains ..._ ___In Whitesburg, I sat down with Tarence and Tom to record an episode of the Trillbilly Worker's Party podcast ..._ ___Later that night in Whitesburg, we had a meet and greet. A young man came up to me after and said while he didn’t feel comfortable speaking in front of the crowd, he was so inspired by the conversations in the room, he wanted to share his priorities with me. He told me that politicians typically don't care what he thinks ..._ ___In Bowling Green, I marched alongside the Sunrise Movement to demand a Green New Deal for our Commonwealth, economy, and planet. Sunrise Movement endorsed our movement earlier that day ..._ ___I visited the folks at Shake Rag Barbershop in Bowling Green for my first professional haircut in years. I usually cut my own to save money I can use to support my girls. I was so excited about the cut that I called my mom and my wife. Life makes you appreciate the little things ..._ ___We brought the movement to the airwaves Friday on Bowling Green’s WBKO with Gene Birk ..._ ___We closed out the week in Glasgow delivering food to families. We’re all about spreading goodwill ..._ This movement is about people. It’s about making sure everyone has enough money in their pocket so they don’t have to worry about where their next meal will come from or how they’ll pay for that lifesaving medication they need. It’s about making sure the voices of real people aren’t drowned out by corporate PAC money or billionaire donors. [_**But I need your help to keep this tour going across the Commonwealth. clean_body: | Folks, I wanted to write to you personally to share how our listening tour across the Commonwealth is going so far. But before I start, I’m going to ask for your support. Your grassroots donations have helped me travel across the Commonwealth this past week, and I’m depending on you to keep this tour going, too. It’s the only way to make sure every Kentuckian gets a seat at the decision-making table. = Thanks for standing with this movement. Now, here’s what my team and I have been up to: We started in Covington, where I heard from folks who love our Commonwealth and want to make sure everyone in Kentucky gets their fair share ... _After the event, Sister Janet and I locked arms with the promise that Kentuckians like us will move forward together. With the faith of a mustard seed, we’ll move the biggest mountains ... _In Whitesburg, I sat down with Tarence and Tom to record an episode of the Trillbilly Worker's Party podcast ... _Later that night in Whitesburg, we had a meet and greet. A young man came up to me after and said while he didn’t feel comfortable speaking in front of the crowd, he was so inspired by the conversations in the room, he wanted to share his priorities with me. He told me that politicians typically don't care what he thinks ... _In Bowling Green, I marched alongside the Sunrise Movement to demand a Green New Deal for our Commonwealth, economy, and planet. Sunrise Movement endorsed our movement earlier that day ... _I visited the folks at Shake Rag Barbershop in Bowling Green for my first professional haircut in years. I usually cut my own to save money I can use to support my girls. I was so excited about the cut that I called my mom and my wife. Life makes you appreciate the little things ... _We brought the movement to the airwaves Friday on Bowling Green’s WBKO with Gene Birk ... _We closed out the week in Glasgow delivering food to families. We’re all about spreading goodwill ... This movement is about people. It’s about making sure everyone has enough money in their pocket so they don’t have to worry about where their next meal will come from or how they’ll pay for that lifesaving medication they need. It’s about making sure the voices of real people aren’t drowned out by corporate PAC money or billionaire donors. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support. I can’t wait to tell you even more stories from the listening tour. More soon, Charles Booker m&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTFmMTJmNi04ZTFiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IaOAbheHXTYmjMYWn4u2CwMgdTR6cKrvvAaRGgLc0k= = Contributions to CBEC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Nancy Pelosi and John Lewis pass historic voting rights act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In the middle of the impeachment hearings, Nancy Pelosi is showing the country what real leadership looks like. She, along with Reps. John Lewis and Terri Sewell, passed a landmark voting rights bill, the Voting Rights Advancement Act (VRAA), which would restore voting rights and election protections gutted by the conservatives on the Supreme Court. BUT all but one Republican voted against it in the House, and Mitch McConnell's waiting to kill the bill in the Senate. Republicans don't want more people to vote. They know that when people vote, the GOP loses. They'd rather keep as few people voting as possible so they can hold on to power and let their rich donors dictate policy instead of the people. At When Democrats, we're doing all we can to inform voters about the GOP's nefarious actions and get them to the polls to defeat the GOP. If we're going to have a fair chance at taking back the Senate and the White House in 2020, everyone who is eligible to vote needs the chance to \-- and we HAVE to stop the GOP from cheating, purging voter rolls, and discouraging voters. We need 10,000 engaged Democrats to demand the Senate pass the VRAA and ensure every eligible voter can vote in 2020 \-- if you believe we need to stand up to the GOP and protect the right to vote: **Demand the Senate protect the right to vote!** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdca8/6e9863e8/170dcdcf/1db0ba97/3133992871/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/JqDwfykS") Thank you for standing up for democracy. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdca8/6e9863e8/170dcdcf/1db0ba96/3133992871/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191210a.ND&refcode2=VaGcNRZA6DDjUbVuvKN8")
---

subject: Year in Review: Steve King edition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

As Congress wraps up this year, we wanted to go over some of Steve King’s accomplishments in 2019.

...

...

...

name: Laura Loomer
subject: I’m just “some woman kicked off of social media”
body:
I read an article today and couldn’t help but laugh at the hypocrisy.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356172-831110-4750980-5f8936a30a-0ab0f91b01)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356172-831110-4750980-5f8936a30a-0ab0f91b01) I read an article today and couldn’t help but laugh at the hypocrisy.

My opponent, radical Democrat Lois Frankel was asked by the local press if she was concerned about her challengers.

Before I share her response, let me put this in context.

While I’m running against Lois Frankel in Florida’s 21st Congressional District, I’m also her constituent.

I am, without question, the most banned woman in America due to social media bias against conservatives.

While terrorists and their sympathizers enjoy unfettered use of social media, Facebook calls me “dangerous.”

Facebook and Twitter changed their policies on campaigns to prevent me from reaching voters.

When they banned me, Facebook didn’t call me a “liar” or a purveyor of fake news. They called me a “dangerous individual.”

In the world of socialists and Democrats, I am dangerous. I’m dangerous to their agenda.

So they tried to silence me through a series of bans and cut off my access to reach millions of people.

And as my Congresswoman, did Lois Frankel do anything about tech giants silencing me and cutting off the accounts of thousands of conservatives around the nation?

Nope.

But when Iran cut off Internet access for many of its citizens, Lois Frankel called it a “continued human rights violation.”

Yeah, no joke.

[embed tweet]

Now going back to Frankel’s response regarding her Republican challenger (me), she only had this to say:

**“She only heard of ‘some woman’ who was ‘kicked off social media’ as being one of the Republican candidates.**
Ha!

If that were true, then Lois Frankel wouldn’t just be oblivious to reality, something would have to be seriously wrong with her.

But it’s not true. Frankel is a seasoned, four-term member of Congress who is no stranger to politics.

When my campaign announced that we outraised her last quarter, I’m pretty sure I could hear the screams from Washington coming from her and her staff.

I even heard her poor office dog, Pepper, was upset by all of the commotion.

But now, when the media asks, Lois Frankel can’t recall my name.

If you don’t mind, remind her what my name is by [**sending her a tweet today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356172-831110-4750980-5f8936a30a-0ab0f91b01).

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

| Team,

From his days launching the first brewpub in Colorado to his two terms as Governor--John has gotten where he is today thanks to the support of communities coming together to get things done.

This race for Senate is no different.

John isn't accepting a single penny of corporate PAC money. He's counting on support from his friends and neighbors, just like he has at every point in his career.

Our Founding Partners are John's core group of supporters.

This race for Senate is no different. John isn't accepting a single penny of corporate PAC money. He's counting on support from his friends and neighbors, just like he has at every point in his career. "=" Our Founding Partners are John's core group of supporters. They're the people who have believed in this campaign early and often, and they're the reason this campaign is turning into a grassroots powerhouse after just a few short months. And throughout this race, our Founding Partners will be the first to know major updates from John and the campaign. Your donation is a symbolic representation that you own a piece of what we're building together. Chip in any amount now and become a Founding Partner today: If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away. subject: articles of impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |

| |
---
| | Today, the House of Representatives officially filed two articles of impeachment against President Trump.
**The articles make clear what we 've known for some time: he broke the law and put our national security at risk for his own benefit. ** This isn't about politics. Even as many of us are running to replace him next November, he still must be held accountable for breaking the law. **This is Congress 's duty.** This is about removing a criminal from the office he has proven unfit to serve. It seems that many - including most Republicans - will sadly make this a partisan process in the Senate. **We need to show Mitch McConell and his cronies that we won 't let them or Trump off the hook next November. ** We need Americans across the country to get off the sidelines to defeat their lawlessness. We need a nominee bold enough to stand up to Trump, and to rebuild the Obama coalition to win. [Contribute now and make sure we're ready: ](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a2/3eb3e2fc/68bc8674/744d1df2/2259844832/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a2/3eb3e2fc/68bc8674/744d1df8/2259844832/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191210_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191210_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a2/3eb3e2fc/68bc8674/744d1de7/2259844832/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191210_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191210_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a2/3eb3e2fc/68bc8674/744d1de6/2259844832/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191210_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191210_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

| **TROY DOWNING FOR STATE AUDITOR**
_**CAMPAIGN UPDATE**_
---
| _**Help Us Finish the Year Strong**_ Friends,
Christmas is quickly approaching but Team Downing is working hard through the holidays to finish this year strong. With just three weeks left of the year please consider chipping in $5 before the first.

---

---
| [DONATE NOW](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=e2c92f922f&e=a212bb87cc "DONATE NOW")
---
|
---
| _**On the Campaign Trail with Troy**_
---
|
---
|
---
---
| Troy made it to Rob Riggle's InVETational to help raise money for the Semper Fi Fund which is dedicated to providing financial assistance and lifetime support to combat wounded, critically ill, and catastrophically injured members of all branches of the Armed Forces and their families. Troy ran into some old friends and made some new ones including Haley Joel Osmunt from the Sixth Sense movie.

---
|
---
---
| Troy participated in the Veterans History and Arts Initiative.
---
|
---
| Heather and Troy got to meet Santa at the Kiwanis Internation Cakes for Kids breakfast.
---
|
---
| Perfect weather for the Christmas Stroll in Bozeman
---
|
---
|
---
| _**HELP US FIGHT IMPEACHMENT**_

---
| [Sign the Petition](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=9baca0fd60&e=a212bb87cc "Sign the Petition")
---
| | _Troy's Thought of the Day: _
Milton Friedman said that "_The government solution to a problem is usually as bad as the problem."_ Nowhere is this statement truer than in healthcare. Every governmental monopolization of a sector of the economy has only driven up prices for consumers. This is clearly evident in healthcare but also in college tuition and housing. In fact, since 1996 the cost of medical care has risen 105%. Compare this to competitive industries such as the cost of TV's which have fallen 96% in the same timeframe.
The data does not lie. It's time to institute market-driven solutions to healthcare--not more bureaucratic control over doctors and patients.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Another Pathetic Jerry Nadler Impeachment Charade
body:
"Poor Jerry Nadler: The House Judiciary Committee chief so wants to make the rush to impeach President Trump look respectable..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=565ebe6444&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Another Pathetic Jerry Nadler Impeachment Charade**

“Poor Jerry Nadler: The House Judiciary Committee chief so wants to make the rush to impeach President Trump look respectable — but his hearings keep doing the reverse.”

The _New York Post_ editorial board explains why. “Monday’s show, which nominally began the drafting of articles of impeachment, has to qualify as Democrats’ most blatant publicity stunt so far . . . If Dems really had a solid case, they’d slow down the process, ensure that it’s fair and earn GOP support. That they won’t is strong reason to doubt the whole endeavor.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a41f702dc3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The press corps is portraying Monday’s report by Justice Department Inspector General Michael Horowitz as absolution for the Federal Bureau of Investigation, but don’t believe it. The report relates a trail of terrible judgment and violations of process that should shock Americans who thought better of their premier law-enforcement agency,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=26be74e4a5&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “It’s now official: Russia, Russia, Russia really was fake news from the start. There was no factual basis for the FBI to spy on Donald Trump’s campaign . . . J. Edgar Hoover can finally rest in peace. James Comey is now revealed to be the dirtiest cop ever to run the FBI,” Michael Goodwin writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eaf736ed27&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “As President Trump visits [Pennsylvania] this week, the Keystone State’s economic future is bright. Everyone who wants to find a better job has more opportunities to do so, and wages continue to rise!” That’s because in addition to President Trump’s pro-growth agenda—tax cuts, trade reform, and deregulation—he is also working hard to make sure shuttered plants across the Rust Belt are coming back to life, White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes in the [_York Dispatch_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99c04d853b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “In the spirit of Christmas, first lady Melania Trump visited the Marine Toys for Tots program Monday at Joint Base Anacostia-Bolling in Washington, D.C., to sort toys for children in need,” Frank Connor reports for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=95e706b818&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e00d93942&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e86026586&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ff775c975b)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Sara 2020
subject: Newsweek: "Donald Trump is on track to confirm 180 federal judges -- just as he predicted"
body:
This should terrify you.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fbf/4bef7a87/6a7ba0eb/287fe1c4/3889922188/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -- This headline should terrify you:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fbf/4bef7a87/6a7ba0eb/287fe1db/3889922188/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTAtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191210-1-b")
Trump is stacking the federal judiciary with far-right judges with lifetime appointments -- and Susan Collins has voted to confirm almost all of them.
**That's why we need a Senator like Sara Gideon, who will vote against extremist, unqualified judicial nominees. If you agree:**
**[Make a $3 contribution to support Sara's campaign for U.S. Senate today. Our campaign isn't taking any money from corporate PACs, so your donation goes a very long way.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fbf/4bef7a87/6a7ba0eb/287fe1db/3889922188/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTAtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191210-1-b")**
Remember, these judicial positions are lifetime appointments. Trump's judges will be making decisions that affect millions of people for _generations_. It's critical that we don't let them tighten their hold over our courts of law any more than they already have.
Thanks for reading,
_Team Sara_
**Susan Collins has voted to confirm almost all of Trump 's far-right judicial nominees. No more.**

subject: This is important.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This really does matter.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8278?t=3&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0) Friend, The legally mandated fundraising freeze is three days away -- this deadline couldn't be more serious. After midnight on Friday, not one dollar can be accepted to power our campaign. _It'll stay that way for more than three long months while Jay's opponents -- including ultra-conservative Tim Eyman -- keep raking in thousands upon thousands of dollars and the Republican Governors Association builds their war chest to use against us._ **If you believe Jay is the leader Washington state needs and the leader the climate movement needs, then you need to step up now:** [**Donate $1 or more today to help us raise $50,000 before Friday's midnight deadline!**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8278?t=4&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8279?t=5&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0)
