---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8284?t=10&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0)
---
Thanks,
Molly
\------- Forwarded message -------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Monday, Dec 9, 2019
Subject: We can't fall short before the freeze.
[](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8278?t=11&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0) | [CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8278?t=12&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0)
---
Friend,
This is the last week I can accept donations of any kind for more than three months. My opponents don't have that restriction whatsoever -- and the Republican Governors Association has millions of dollars on hand to help any or all of them try to chip away at our progress.
That's why this deadline matters:**Friay at minight, all fundraising stops.** My opponents will just keep accepting donations hand-over-fist while we're hard at work during the legislative session.
[**That's why we need to raise $50,000 before Friday's midnight deadline: We're well on our way to hitting our goal, but we're not there yet. Will you donate $1 or more right now?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8278?t=13&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8279?t=14&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8280?t=15&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8281?t=16&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8282?t=17&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8283?t=18&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8284?t=19&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0)
---
I'm so proud of the work we're doing here in Washington state: We're taking monumental steps to set the foundation for the next generation of progressive leaders and the future of the climate movement.
We have to be bold to make real progress, and that's exactly what we're doing. Like Greta Thunberg has said for months now, the climate crisis is a moral outrage -- and it's up to each of us to do something about it. From my seat leading Washington state, we're taking some of the most progressive steps to fight this crisis while improving people's lives. But if I lose this election, we'll lose that progress.
**$50,000 will go a long way to fuel the fight in the months ahead when we can't raise any campaign contributions -- that's why I'm asking, because this is so important:**
[**Will you donate $1 or more before Friday's freeze deadline? We're well on our way to our goal, but we simply can't fall short here -- every dollar makes a difference.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8278?t=20&akid=8005%2E868730%2EKltgz0)
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: U.S. Senator Ed Markey
subject: Tell Mitch McConnell to bring my Save the Internet Act to the floor for a vote to restore net neutrality.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
This month marks two years since Donald Trump's FCC voted to repeal net neutrality. | |
---
| Friends -

This month marks two years since Donald Trump's FCC voted to repeal net neutrality.

I've been fighting ever since to restore these critical rules that would ensure a free and open internet for all.

We nearly won on this issue in Congress last session. The Senate voted to reverse the FCC's repeal, but Paul Ryan ran the clock out on us by refusing to hold a vote.

Today, I'm bringing this issue back to the floor to demand another vote. Will you stand with me in this fight?

**[Tell Mitch McConnell to bring my Save the Internet Act to the floor for a vote to restore net neutrality. Over 85% of Americans agree with us on this issue, but we need to make our voices heard.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df2b/693b8b0a/43b25c7b/72de7c77/3674653513/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/191210-net-neutrality?source=em191210-full")**

This is about making sure big internet service providers don't build fast lanes for those who can afford them, while the rest of us are stuck with slower speeds or blocked websites.

The strength of our democracy depends on having a free and open internet.

The House has already voted on this bill, and it passed easily. This bill can pass the Senate too, but we need to get Mitch McConnell to call the vote.

**[Add your name: Demand Mitch McConnell bring my Save the Internet Act to the floor. The future of a free and open internet is at stake if we do not act.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df2b/693b8b0a/43b25c7b/72de7c77/3674653513/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/191210-net-neutrality?source=em191210-full")**

We are on the right side of history, and we won't give up this fight.

But it is a fight. It is us versus large, powerful corporations who put their own profits over a free and open internet.

Keep fighting,

Ed
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df2b/693b8b0a/43b25c7b/72de7c77/3674653513/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/191210-net-neutrality?source=em191210-full")**

clean_body: This month marks two years since Donald Trump's FCC voted to repeal net neutrality. | | | Friends - This month marks two years since Donald Trump's FCC voted to repeal net neutrality. I've been fighting ever since to restore these critical rules that would ensure a free and open internet for all. We nearly won on this issue in Congress last session. The Senate voted to reverse the FCC's repeal, but Paul Ryan ran the clock out on us by refusing to hold a vote. Today, I'm bringing this issue back to the floor to demand another vote. Will you stand with me in this fight? "" This is about making sure big internet service providers don't build fast lanes for those who can afford them, while the rest of us are stuck with slower speeds or blocked websites. The strength of our democracy depends on having a free and open internet. The House has already voted on this bill, and it passed easily. This bill can pass the Senate too, but we need to get Mitch McConnell to call the vote. "" We are on the right side of history, and we won't give up this fight. But it is a fight. It is us versus large, powerful corporations who put their own profits over a free and open internet. Keep fighting, Ed "" | | Paid for by The Markey Committee Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Andrew Bourne
subject: [YOU'RE INVITED] Team Stanton Holiday Event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Good afternoon, I'm Andrew, the finance director for Greg Stanton's re-election campaign to Congress.

Our Holiday Fundraiser for Congressman Stanton is only a few days away and we wanted to invite you to join us for our year-end party!

**It will take place on **Saturday, December 14th** from **6-8pm**. It is being catered by Pizzeria Bianco and we'll have our very own Bianco pizza chef making signature pies in our host's wood-fired oven.**

We hope you will be able to come celebrate with us to make sure that we hit our goals for the end of the year. _There is only a short time left to RSVP for this exciting event, so please make sure to let us know below if you will be attending._

**[If you'd like to attend, you can RSVP here with this link >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/wvhiifoc37uQAarONLkVL_b6mjP2tj2U4qYS-vkb47s=/oJz4naQOsQkFEzshmCCRlp-c-CXlooSSz3tdrSoURHw=)**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We want to remain in the Paris Agreement. Do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump has made it clear throughout his campaign and presidency that he thinks climate change is a hoax and efforts to combat it are hurting businesses. Now, he's taken the bold, reckless, and dangerous step of withdrawing the U.S. from the Paris Agreement, the most comprehensive international treaty combating climate change. With this, he's all but guaranteed that the U.S. will continue polluting at unprecedented levels, dooming us and future generations to a planet wracked by extreme weather and mass extinction due to drastic changes in the environment. [**But we can fight back. We can stand up to the president and tell him we want to be a part of the Paris Agreement and combat the severe damage we 're doing to our own planet. If you agree, please add your name today to demand we remain in the Paris Agreement!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdca6/6e9863e8/170f2aa7/1db0ba9b/3285214991/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/parisclimate/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing up for the planet and future generations. subject: Dark 💰💰 flooding into VA!

body:
We just got word that pro-Trump dark money groups are planning to drop millions of dollars in negative ads against Virginia Democrats up for re-election in 2020.
|
---
| | Hey Derek,

We just got word that **pro-Trump dark money groups are planning to drop _millions of dollars_ in negative ads against Virginia Democrats up for re-election in 2020.**

This is just more evidence that Virginia is going to be a battleground in 2020. The President has made that clear. And it's likely these attacks will only get worse as we get closer to Election Day. [**Help fight back. Rush a donation today.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d756/53d9897e/53e7df28/1c89f202/896955306/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-attackads?refcode=20191210_f_1_nd__378__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5") It's absolutely critical that Mark is able to spread his message across the Commonwealth ahead of the 2020 elections, but that's going to be tough with dark money attack ads bashing Virginia Democrats.

**This flood of negative ads could drown out our attempts to share Mark 's positive vision for the Commonwealth, threatening all the progress we've made over the past few years.**

If we want to have a chance of keeping VA blue next year, we need to push back -- **_starting right now._**

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: OFFICIAL: Democrats unveil articles of impeachment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
They're really going through with it. Today the Democrats officially unveiled articles of impeachment, accusing President Trump of abuse of power and obstruction.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00100iQkvTjsZin67a575jhNMlB48io8fobla2I_--62cwPfAr9q7VIf_PlBhOW8aZaD5_IUjlc2EA4wk1siVx6g5De9UmUPWY_W_h1F_3aLcw2h9wO5Q3hFGfSkuZrFRaBrIFSKGF6uZ7AVcBivfRox0OJnQjOwRq6Jh9tge2_QQ6DmfwxssNgjFtT9zcjILpozuFtpn0Ob5o8Ppt5z8pc8TT5yYPmgFNwfbD8gQ-drs3BotDVozSWVph3LWPKWaIa&c=W10-snfgtcNVhDY0O9Z20bBnOTUffqXKw3WJdevUb6WkgiHNuucrRg==&ch=OiS9LG2JH2pwYsZmmQrIxyhPWIdG4EmTS4dX3SniLC2w8QKDvKMevw==)
---
| We knew their arguments would be flimsy, but this seems like a joke. They rushed through a completely unprecedented, unfair, and biased process so they could introduce these articles of impeachment before Christmas. It's completely unfair to President Trump and completely unfair to the American people.
---
| | | [END THE IMPEACHMENT CHARADE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00100iQkvTjsZin67a575jhNMlB48io8fobla2I_--62cwPfAr9q7VIf_PlBhOW8aZaXR0_yr1D5w7Ql3fJqON_4UGOwIx8Vk7nrDEo0rWa2m18239D5So-vl1GeITfLyh9x0LRGs1yJ1sU6sm6oa_6VbznGiA73Eyn6UP6n-2BwR_DHM-p3gIqrQ==&c=W10-snfgtcNVhDY0O9Z20bBnOTUffqXKw3WJdevUb6WkgiHNuucrRg==&ch=OiS9LG2JH2pwYsZmmQrIxyhPWIdG4EmTS4dX3SniLC2w8QKDvKMevw==)
---
| Yesterday during another sham impeachment hearing led by Jerry Nadler, [I went off and exposed the "non-partisan" lawyer that Adam Schiff sent to sit in his place.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00100iQkvTjsZin67a575jhNMlB48io8fobla2I_--62cwPfAr9q7VIf3joiodvsjjfPQTD0ZjY7gRj0AiDNvjobKESb-njWCV4CbKEsRt39t0TeL0mIdf1hWQsrXMiwk947dtTlvJgBupAYNIBIQ_a41tMKbEC_N3c8NunHipQnFMC_CeliYK-NA==&c=W10-snfgtcNVhDY0O9Z20bBnOTUffqXKw3WJdevUb6WkgiHNuucrRg==&ch=OiS9LG2JH2pwYsZmmQrIxyhPWIdG4EmTS4dX3SniLC2w8QKDvKMevw==) You won't see that exchange in the news because it completely destroys the Mainstream Media's narrative. We need to come together and defend the President from the Democrats and their ultra-powerful friends in the Fake News media who have been lying to us the moment Donald Trump was elected.

---
| | | [JOIN THE TRUMP DEFENSE TEAM](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00100iQkvTjsZin67a575jhNMlB48io8fobla2I_--62cwPfAr9q7VIf_PlBhOW8aZaXR0_yr1D5w7Ql3fJqON_4UGOwIx8Vk7nrDEo0rWa2m18239D5So-vl1GeITfLyh9x0LRGs1yJ1sU6sm6oa_6VbznGiA73Eyn6UP6n-2BwR_DHM-p3gIqrQ==&c=W10-snfgtcNVhDY0O9Z20bBnOTUffqXKw3WJdevUb6WkgiHNuucrRg==&ch=OiS9LG2JH2pwYsZmmQrIxyhPWIdG4EmTS4dX3SniLC2w8QKDvKMevw==)
---
| |
---
| I'll never stop defending President Trump from these partisan attacks and baseless accusations. I hope you'll join me in the fight for the truth.
---
|
---
| Matt Gaetz
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00100iQkvTjsZin67a575jhNMlB48io8fobla2I_--62cwPfAr9q7VIf7d8iiRhcCMi8wbJyoKGFds55IsJKWuFAQ470fXCyWvrpsyaLPRrSTeBCxqcmChZfK8msjCqyImh8tAgrYJ5bs_hbu35_cxWobZC_gBUkkiXUAfYwcY6StLehlMDv0yMPQ==&c=W10-snfgtcNVhDY0O9Z20bBnOTUffqXKw3WJdevUb6WkgiHNuucrRg==&ch=OiS9LG2JH2pwYsZmmQrIxyhPWIdG4EmTS4dX3SniLC2w8QKDvKMevw==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00100iQkvTjsZin67a575jhNMlB48io8fobla2I_--62cwPfAr9q7VIf7d8iiRhcCMipZN56jfvOCppoOt90vx12xuW_NqSdkmcP9WfnNJN6JXJKXhlYwjcqideLfOHJxEBjxORwOTaW-LkgfDbeODYLg==&c=W10-snfgtcNVhDY0O9Z20bBnOTUffqXKw3WJdevUb6WkgiHNuucrRg==&ch=OiS9LG2JH2pwYsZmmQrIxyhPWIdG4EmTS4dX3SniLC2w8QKDvKMevw==)

We kicked off December with a busy week on the campaign trail. It’s been great meeting so many of you, hearing about your hopes & dreams for this race, and learning more about how we can create a campaign for the people. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JAE/ni0YAA/t.2xf/dzUUmdnWSwa4DMl-oihuKQ/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw5PDyqpntLVx5A3-2Be00h1S38b2p5XhEfb5QpZyuu18C0Bww5HNNfXo-2F6yNk9dYHZaFHVbqWwp6nThDIm-2BI2p-2FTL1U-2B5Utt6-2F04fQzKYw-2FHl-2FIn0omBQNR-2F0YIoSE-2FiHdHJmvhyoc4S-2BpOR2QVzetBHHGQPeV2b53XIiw3A5ozn5YAlQwO34beKYxIy8apUyTXsmkl67Fnf-2BM9f9hBmDMTPJkWmn2h642yNGxOjlmnbiYrNCKBHoMMg4wUl1wDtdYr/ab3S)
Hi Friend, **** We kicked off December with a busy week on the campaign trail. It’s been great meeting so many of you, hearing about your hopes & dreams for this race, and learning more about how we can create a campaign for the people. **We want to share with you some of our favorite moments from last week!** **[But before we dive in, can we count on you to chip in $5 today to our grassroots campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JAE/ni0YAA/t.2xf/dzUUmdnWSwa4DMl-oihuKQ/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw5PDyqpntLVx5A3-2Be00h1S38b2p5XhEfb5QpZyuu18C0lUUBTgAwXw-2BDEHmolqpJTaTJg0jMmpGl5wt6-2Fk3uZ97NJlj8cOHw8gLSxOJd7ILhQS8zI9sEKk2qYj50umnQABwzeu8UuYb3wPgjrWUfAvW6du7Ap8nWSNfkybz8HNIgLFHe6F-2BTCqySXc5JgH5OuNgF5kwevnV5qfJs9zXPnV1Zk1x8OXN-2FOu8sPBcCedDNw6wFoP9Uf6jH97lcZj8F9/AV0O)****** Right now, we’re falling a little behind on our fundraising numbers for this quarter, but if everyone pitches in — even a little bit — we can get this done. [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JAE/ni0YAA/t.2xf/dzUUmdnWSwa4DMl-oihuKQ/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw5PDyqpntLVx5A3-2Be00h1SyifU1FlSNcPxqnib73b4T0meTXRAlAnUcDrf6QvovLdUs-2B8L04B90vAojcxhedQuUP8-2BJosPkXoSHUBhVRP-2BDtFPaxE7LnsSx0iNMHMoYpSpLytTWG1iZBCCR-2BwVA6GJ-2BN8HJaPujB-2F3e6aJ9lryLOsKaf96X-2FM-2BEn4xFqXFTylraC2O-2BRiKPa-2BF-2B4FdX6dEaKrEMo7rvaasCUC4RiyaW2cknHy6aOmkbPB9FGEEWGJqa0bAztAtIYyyWfnMDdwDg-3D-3D/BFhv) **Let’s begin the recap!** Last week, Mondaire spoke at a meeting of the Town of Greenburgh Democratic Committee. He was the only candidate there who called for the forgiveness of college debt, supported a Green New Deal, and promoted a wealth tax on the ultra-rich. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JAE/ni0YAA/t.2xf/dzUUmdnWSwa4DMl-oihuKQ/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw5PDyqpntLVx5A3-2Be00h1S38b2p5XhEfb5QpZyuu18C2jITlbew7Skx-2F2iTBhv9hOhK35fMUH-2BZkbhpkpWcXDCHXyBtj-2Fz6xOXKib2CLHwC21Zi-2F6EVWcqwot7u4RMMJTyDIILJ6zNHYMXbc2LlU2ZgKKlFqJblklIkIqVktRoeVRp5-2BXEp6xdUQi2CR8gLaMWfOcTBmPvBrqN1xMo5MUWSViST9qOHmIlewWjfr1uuCuoP2Waf1bIREzGNS7ZZ8a/Q-_6)
We had an awesome meet and greet in Irvington that had over _100 people_ in attendance.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JAE/ni0YAA/t.2xf/dzUUmdnWSwa4DMl-oihuKQ/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw5PDyqpntLVx5A3-2Be00h1S38b2p5XhEfb5QpZyuu18C074Io3FN-2Bsnf1Hn-2BINlYXoPr01XicihGIR-2BePPg6bj3RF-2FOkSjbvMJuD-2FAXDe2B3cdxDvPuFY2QzmkPXlzHRjKlC0Hanxwm7nb0r1SzisO-2BE3sAKNCJ1QxWeB32VIwwmgoDIlUIx30qRKqEO3zf1OidjB4uZ5Ej9YUWNvXJiV5J2kpIeDIInIUZ-2BDmpOb7sfOW0P4-2Bh0ar8g5I2IHFQ4Qg/S-eF)
Mondaire also recorded a podcast with Black Lives Matter activist DeRay McKesson! We’re excited for people to listen and learn about Mondaire’s message and what our campaign stands for once the episode is released. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JAE/ni0YAA/t.2xf/dzUUmdnWSwa4DMl-oihuKQ/h5/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw5PDyqpntLVx5A3-2Be00h1S38b2p5XhEfb5QpZyuu18C1zH4iyZ4dEYyKqL5XIL8qwDHLmHaD5ZJ9UrEAQSo-2FCkP-2F5Zo1hSfes6iEpc0WzNjtJYfnGny5KjzIQ0V3MTxN6RoWlsUMDKWOHJr6IStdXD35dCpOGwdSFsgoMnhLAUaCcqAGAGrs4mfsPyCsdZ7k0ptVHm-2BFaeCPEBP56cQ8Yq-2BCQeeMvVocjtOW6-2F7ckXHKx1a1afnJJXHQk9SrthaVq/etDh)
**_And we had some time to party too_** — Mondaire attended the Westchester Young Democrats Holiday Party. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JAE/ni0YAA/t.2xf/dzUUmdnWSwa4DMl-oihuKQ/h6/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw5PDyqpntLVx5A3-2Be00h1S38b2p5XhEfb5QpZyuu18C0rvkvb0K11rcMWNcXQM75EvKZnWY-2Fuq1S-2F-2BfOmnhWLUv36OaoCeRKBb0KFzE6S064BMwUPN-2FDFrI8-2F-2FrIzjJVY5FD58aseW2oAB3-2B2Vv1gFDQETc4r13bylswUReLgUVnsJNBPJES34-2FLVKY2VboKaFQoGTOshS12C2hrqrvNdzdqzdvJT5SLiISyiCQZBXWVMaF-2Bzv-2BJT4wwPq1bHg8lO/sDAF) December is off to a great start. We’re hopeful we can make this our strongest month yet and send a strong message that our campaign has the people-power to win. [****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JAE/ni0YAA/t.2xf/dzUUmdnWSwa4DMl-oihuKQ/h7/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw5PDyqpntLVx5A3-2Be00h1S38b2p5XhEfb5QpZyuu18C0YtNv9VYa95ym9ZhC2LTMNdXcjVvd2U3b19CJsrI8PWJC84RX0qXRUGG-2Bl9SdAOKUPFwETpU9CFjAJP5JjXY7KJlPrHye81NYPqZZZh9HFyKwGNtYWK1eJ2EKa5enkjD9SkTAuA4ApXw62rSCOKpZKIJuvTRwazw3l1loXA-2BTQcXuCzqYO9RCer5wxFWfFgwL8jep4ZL-2Bt4n-2BE4XijZmN0/PcuS)******[Every little bit counts in an ultra-competitive race like this: will you give $5 or anything you can to make sure we send a bold, progressive leader to represent New York’s 17th next year?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JAE/ni0YAA/t.2xf/dzUUmdnWSwa4DMl-oihuKQ/h8/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw5PDyqpntLVx5A3-2Be00h1S38b2p5XhEfb5QpZyuu18C0HlrGZ1US7gP-2Fnr3-2BDsiaxfaIF9efbzPboRF8PaOa2XBIRHZe-2FjvI4oIxgeOFb8PHhjW7-2FzIEIQpThoMBs2YDvt-2Bx3clujxGA2Oz34YbJsWkzIIV7HFkyzidRkB2NnsXM1o74R4q8Fi5WVzrQwKVYjPsr1ZKjAek-2BoHy6dEAntg4Qr-2FTNOmHjcezqaTbJ8m9iAqPrKyGg5HLQX9JK0CIJx/A8rj)****[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JAE/ni0YAA/t.2xf/dzUUmdnWSwa4DMl-oihuKQ/h9/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw5PDyqpntLVx5A3-2Be00h1S38b2p5XhEfb5QpZyuu18C1PjQmXCd4kLbNr7AW-2Fsa710xKqqltDG0mEWHLKb1Iq1t6uj-2FA7Y8hQyPAHxvtKWddGUI0Gr464IW8IvF2VUJMGVbEkaYL5oqbBTgnk4jen2qPPCvA2CB8R5dxAOjpYv0-2Bw00z4ogi2bVJW0w4H08bllax9s17MN7-2BeBnIehvHPedfudbppJDapQyJ9BuoCu4usEDcqsddmedqoAQcQmkXt/XyAJ)** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JAE/ni0YAA/t.2xf/dzUUmdnWSwa4DMl-oihuKQ/h10/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw5PDyqpntLVx5A3-2Be00h1SyifU1FlSNcPxqnib73b4T3PM3RzG8SRSs9j1ZdfHd8DtxD0ccSeygKfb-2FwK1TdqsCR2bjGbkD1arSmCxskr9WWM43uxWeMLG9OMUfQMZDQfLuI5Gks6zqM9dCIb-2FSlYkef2NX1Z2Zn8gXMmSi13XkZAjyBvOhzslax2ddbkaI2-2Fauzjmry93wluMHFGs6-2BXxyAf29YDMmE47iwacQSh6z61A3vBpHXbJ-2Fkzuire-2BKhIqmBQDccOgcI6U94vdpp-2B2w-3D-3D/th3Z) Let’s do this, Team Mondaire

Republicans have been doing _everything_ in their power to make it harder to vote -- including taking their case to the Supreme Court, which negated parts of the landmark 1965 Voting Rights Act. **Whether it’s purging voter rolls or gerrymandering districts -- our voting rights are under attack.** But instead of voting to protect our right to vote, Vern Buchanan voted against the people he’s supposed to represent. **This is wrong. Our democracy only functions if we, the people, have a voice. Our vote is our voice and must be protected.** Vern Buchanan is not protecting our vote. We need someone who will. Democracy is stronger if more of us have a say in how it’s run. We should demand more from lawmakers like Vern Buchanan who want to pick and choose which voters they represent. [**So if you believe every vote should count, add your name now. Tell Vern Buchanan: Support voters, don’t suppress them.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12733288/131351653/-76598513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWE0ZmMyOC1hYzFiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ropHLQl5ykctIDO07tilpkfV-VZEAfrd3zuP4tYs5SY=&emci=84a4fc28-ac1b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=85a4fc28-ac1b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=9814644) We can make our votes count and our voices heard if we stand up to these attacks on voters’ rights. We appreciate your help in demanding voter protections. clean_body: Team, Last week, the House was given the opportunity to protect voters from having their voting rights stripped away, and Vern Buchanan voted no. This is no surprise. Republicans have been doing everything in their power to make it harder to vote -- including taking their case to the Supreme Court, which negated parts of the landmark 1965 Voting Rights Act. Whether it’s purging voter rolls or gerrymandering districts -- our voting rights are under attack. But instead of voting to protect our right to vote, Vern Buchanan voted against the people he’s supposed to represent. This is wrong. Our democracy only functions if we, the people, have a voice. Our vote is our voice and must be protected. Vern Buchanan is not protecting our vote. We need someone who will. Democracy is stronger if more of us have a say in how it’s run. We should demand more from lawmakers like Vern Buchanan who want to pick and choose which voters they represent. We can make our votes count and our voices heard if we stand up to these attacks on voters’ rights. We appreciate your help in demanding voter protections. Kevin Lata | = | To be removed from this email list, please . PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277

subject: Kendra Horn and Nancy Pelosi have betrayed Sooners
body:
These articles of impeachment are a sham. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f59875e27c7e/calling-all-patriots-12090165?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=494a03150a&e=795c6d9796)

---
| Peter, This morning Nancy Pelosi filed her articles of impeachment, surrounded by California and New York liberals, and with the backing of AOC's Squad and Kendra Horn.

This kind of Washington gamesmanship is exactly what voters elected President Trump to put an end to in 2016. Kendra Horn won this district by pretending to be a common-sense moderate, but now she's showing her true colors.

If Republicans can win any district back from do-nothing Democrats in 2020, it's this one. Kendra Horn has betrayed Sooners' interests and has become a Nancy Pelosi rubber-stamp.

But we have to make sure the person our party nominates to beat her is a principled conservative who will fight the Swamp and get the job done for the grassroots.

I've fought entrenched liberal interests before and I'll do it again in Congress. We need not just a Republican House but a conservative one that will stand with President Trump, secure the border, fix healthcare, cut spending, defend life, and protect the Second Amendment.

[**The stakes are simply too high to get it wrong. Please consider donating just $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to our campaign today so we can power our campaign and keep the pressure up on Kendra Horn.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=15b0400232&e=795c6d9796)

| The Associated Press has called Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020." National Journal said this is the **nation's #1 battleground district** , and Decision Desk HQ said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

The 5th Congressional District is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=dadb8d0140&e=795c6d9796)

[**Will you contribute $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us beat Kendra Horn and send a principled conservative to Congress? name: Michael's iPhone
subject: quick update from the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | Hello friends,

I just left Manchester, where we discussed the importance of paid family and medical leave and ending discrimination in the workplace.

I'm on my way to the next New Hampshire event, but first, [**I 'm going to directly ask you to chip in to help support this campaign.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba968/134673f2/90395b7/6997b519/3338071618/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") (Plus show you some great pics from the road!)

Let me explain why: [I'm committed to holding 50 town halls in New Hampshire in the final 10 weeks before the primary. I'm going to stay here until I answer every question that I'm asked.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba968/134673f2/90395b7/6997b518/3338071618/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Polls show that around 2/3 of voters in this primary are undecided. And I'm going to be here when they make up their minds.

[**We rely on grassroots donations from supporters like you to keep the gas tank full, our cameras rolling, and yard signs abundant. Will you chip in today and help us keep the trains moving?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba968/134673f2/90395b7/6997b519/3338071618/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

You can use this link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba968/134673f2/90395b7/6997b519/3338071618/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I also want to show you some great pics our team has taken - the energy on the ground here is electrifying! Just have a look:

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba968/134673f2/90395b7/6997b519/3338071618/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
Thank you for your continued support,

Michael

Sent from my iPhone

body:
We’ve got big news — Governor Holcomb just unveiled his 2020 Next Level agenda. Since you have been such a big part of our grassroots movement, we... [ **Add Your Name to Support Governor Holcomb’s 2020 Next Level Agenda** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2d2052c4f33244b58f581e74dfbe3a0b&_e=oyR9cbksRJflejF22X9Jt6on2UQI9fRBZ7cUxchAEy1vkiLrVrMTJDbnCyyv7ydEr2j05rSL01_NmYJoc2gtJGQXCXNiVwyYFlrcvMlNpZ8k_F8-VEJ6huAJtpLfdk9lLpas0xgMM1GYgY5pBaCOANolsQqfce7C3VnvOXGeT3UEcmH1k2-_Bpnc_NylUl1G0_f32CEf1GZlcjgGERv27iA6swB9xiDXVvBrqvHM3KXCu4ZUhPz7Mjvhe03OenEEZ0qU64sLDnyAOA-ZIhzS_bG70TxkZIN5Ga4aTFUc7FoLP9nGOapRQx3MG5azEYdEsM6goOkSoRqnq49acjKWX2-XNuy18S0jnVcLUAikwfw7oaJrXflIR8Mu1UG-Y2kCTl0p4eiVaj3p8E0xQfF85Yzo6Qfkh9AdqYWyRpUTob8%3D) | |

| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2d2052c4f33244b58f581e74dfbe3a0b&_e=oyR9cbksRJflejF22X9Jt6on2UQI9fRBZ7cUxchAEy1vkiLrVrMTJDbnCyyv7ydEr2j05rSL01_NmYJoc2gtJGQXCXNiVwyYFlrcvMlNpZ8k_F8-VEJ6huAJtpLfdk9lLpas0xgMM1GYgY5pBaCOANolsQqfce7C3VnvOXGeT3UEcmH1k2-_Bpnc_NylUl1G1QyYr_qOL9X2MwSYiUaEjzLmrAfPmZdwr3U_a6KTDOy9KEggDuSAjBOUitZY4d9hAk3Bkd8xNtzPs-GviQWWpb36-Bvhl_2Z2lVX-Sxl1SYDiM1HXs53dAgCNpdgn-5SkxVJbG-CL8D0qnyt1sFs0OO-Uv2d7kSESt5oa8x7eXTKplaxRHltX7QtlEyTlz6UfVvlSG8e3Sd47EAIDlA0CMNzSjee16wyl1t0XHYF12Q%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

**We’ve got big news — Governor Holcomb just unveiled his 2020 Next Level Agenda. **

Since you have been such a big part of our grassroots movement, we wanted to give you a first look at our biggest priorities in 2020, both administratively and legislatively.

In 2020, Governor Holcomb will continue putting Hoosier students, teachers and parents first. That means listening to our teachers and giving our students the best education possible. And it’s why the Governor is committing himself to:

* Retaining and bringing the very best educators to teach in Indiana

* Changing career-related teacher professional growth points from required to optional

* Supporting the Teacher Compensation Commission and making Indiana a leader in the Midwest for teacher pay

* Working with educators to identify unfunded mandates and unnecessary requirements in K-12 education

* Holding schools and teachers harmless for 2018-2019 ILEARN scores

* Continuing to work to make sure that our teachers can focus on what really matters -- educating our students

[ **Add Your Name to Support Governor Holcomb’s 2020 Next Level Agenda** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2d2052c4f33244b58f581e74dfbe3a0b&_e=oyR9cbksRJflejF22X9Jt6on2UQI9fRBZ7cUxchAEy1vkiLrVrMTJDbnCyyv7ydEr2j05rSL01_NmYJoc2gtJGQXCXNiVwyYFlrcvMlNpZ8k_F8-VEJ6huAJtpLfdk9lLpas0xgMM1GYgY5pBaCOANolsQqfce7C3VnvOXGeT3UEcmH1k2-_Bpnc_NylUl1GcquOMBtveLSQ4EYEQ8_65aXAEZCVvjKyq42SZQLzD6MIKw5M3atxN2-p0amjfIx-vFjS9M1Hki-6up7Gb9UyfYES39cvgERQZID8MftJfauVpAyYl8W-Huw50uYDRTKINHKSawBTLgnQKHujwvXvIdGkRaZ3roZ9OZplkBW74ao5j0W9ZGhuAhwVrKWst54PuILo_KB1s7_TYYS4SyUx6Gf6dCmAUCLa3IY9ntSpp_0%3D)
Governor Holcomb will continue helping offenders become our neighbors again by:

* Helping build individualized case plans for each person -- making sure they have the resources and skills to succeed upon release

* Continuing to help lower Indiana's recidivism rate and grow our workforce

[ **Add Your Name to Support Governor Holcomb’s 2020 Next Level Agenda** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2d2052c4f33244b58f581e74dfbe3a0b&_e=oyR9cbksRJflejF22X9Jt6on2UQI9fRBZ7cUxchAEy1vkiLrVrMTJDbnCyyv7ydEr2j05rSL01_NmYJoc2gtJGQXCXNiVwyYFlrcvMlNpZ8k_F8-VEJ6huAJtpLfdk9lLpas0xgMM1GYgY5pBaCOANolsQqfce7C3VnvOXGeT3UEcmH1k2-_Bpnc_NylUl1GStPTImMDiIUa6xqYx0AW4_SAFRuFhhGTf9UxhgDzwLUw1LQGF4m1KCAzcUxnafJ11Hj6j6clLJoK6UOcdKHWemtxkIT-5klbm8fwBe65EiFZpTCWVZQrCWq9oAJYUUnY2bJ9FF62d6QJ761K8Yoz4BY3PkRxEVlcUJvyrDOxzg5rTSCAUJB7eKRs6tRr86gmPcMJACkkiElw7CDuCfg8xEmJWGqm-EO1bVh8v44cB7w%3D)
Public health will also be a top priority for Governor Holcomb in 2020, including making healthcare more affordable for Hoosiers, making sure that the cost is transparent before treatment, and protecting pregnant women on the job. Governor Holcomb is committed to:

* Providing healthcare price transparency for consumers via an all-payer claims database

* Protecting consumers from surprise medical bills, requiring estimates from providers pre-service upon request

* Supporting pregnant women and new moms on the job by clearly defining employers’ responsibility for workplace accommodations

* Combining health and human service call centers into an improved service, integrating the Indiana 2-1-1 helpline into FSSA call centers

* Incentivizing community paramedicide programs, helping EMS providers provide aid and not just transport

* Supporting raising the age to purchase tobacco and e-cigarettes to 21 and enhancing enforcement

Indiana’s continued economic growth is also a key focus for Governor Holcomb, which is why he is dedicated to:

* Telling Indiana’s story in exciting new ways by activating a new public-private entity to better position Indiana to attract more jobs, talent, and tourism to Indiana

* Tripling federal defense investments in Indiana by 2025, continuing to attract more jobs and innovation to the state

And, of course, Governor Holcomb is committed to continuing to connect Hoosiers to each other and the world. That’s why he is focused on:

* Continuing to grow Indiana’s infrastructure -- including our roads, rail, bridges, ports, trails, water, broadband, international nonstop flights and more

* Decreasing distracted driving by enacting a hands-free device driving law and making Indiana’s roads safer for all

[ **Add Your Name to Support Governor Holcomb’s 2020 Next Level Agenda** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2d2052c4f33244b58f581e74dfbe3a0b&_e=oyR9cbksRJflejF22X9Jt6on2UQI9fRBZ7cUxchAEy1vkiLrVrMTJDbnCyyv7ydEr2j05rSL01_NmYJoc2gtJGQXCXNiVwyYFlrcvMlNpZ8k_F8-VEJ6huAJtpLfdk9lLpas0xgMM1GYgY5pBaCOANolsQqfce7C3VnvOXGeT3UEcmH1k2-_Bpnc_NylUl1GuTE4zU5pb2luoMB1kBGphRZvW3EbYD5hU3XTqLQcQseiE2J4eJNBdm07JOq0fIeqeWmJeSfsfhlzhdBSnMCVmSnaZpgJ9_UBqk-oT7k8ckxjb97jhvPp7VUDjxb3pFiNdDEoJZdOERayJwB8pV_WHk3DM7TNk8Ms4Vul_o50rbMNiLwXMOWVDyHDfHnuuIddgxhUeMZ6nyPkAZvsxBwyHYQoBd0leYDhETcJKxyVVzw%3D)

clean_body: We’ve got big news — Governor Holcomb just unveiled his 2020 Next Level agenda. Since you have been such a big part of our grassroots movement, we... | | | | ---|---|--- Friend, We’ve got big news — Governor Holcomb just unveiled his 2020 Next Level Agenda. Since you have been such a big part of our grassroots movement, we wanted to give you a first look at our biggest priorities in 2020, both administratively and legislatively. In 2020, Governor Holcomb will continue putting Hoosier students, teachers and parents first. That means listening to our teachers and giving our students the best education possible. And it’s why the Governor is committing himself to: Retaining and bringing the very best educators to teach in Indiana Changing career-related teacher professional growth points from required to optional Supporting the Teacher Compensation Commission and making Indiana a leader in the Midwest for teacher pay Working with educators to identify unfunded mandates and unnecessary requirements in K-12 education Holding schools and teachers harmless for 2018-2019 ILEARN scores Continuing to work to make sure that our teachers can focus on what really matters -- educating our students Governor Holcomb will continue helping offenders become our neighbors again by: Helping build individualized case plans for each person -- making sure they have the resources and skills to succeed upon release Continuing to help lower Indiana's recidivism rate and grow our workforce Public health will also be a top priority for Governor Holcomb in 2020, including making healthcare more affordable for Hoosiers, making sure that the cost is transparent before treatment, and protecting pregnant women on the job. Governor Holcomb is committed to: Providing healthcare price transparency for consumers via an all-payer claims database Protecting consumers from surprise medical bills, requiring estimates from providers pre-service upon request Supporting pregnant women and new moms on the job by clearly defining employers’ responsibility for workplace accommodations Combining health and human service call centers into an improved service, integrating the Indiana 2-1-1 helpline into FSSA call centers Incentivizing community paramedicide programs, helping EMS providers provide aid and not just transport Supporting raising the age to purchase tobacco and e-cigarettes to 21 and enhancing enforcement Indiana’s continued economic growth is also a key focus for Governor Holcomb, which is why he is dedicated to: Telling Indiana’s story in exciting new ways by activating a new public-private entity to better position Indiana to attract more jobs, talent, and tourism to Indiana Tripling federal defense investments in Indiana by 2025, continuing to attract more jobs and innovation to the state And, of course, Governor Holcomb is committed to continuing to connect Hoosiers to each other and the world. That’s why he is focused on: Continuing to grow Indiana’s infrastructure -- including our roads, rail, bridges, ports, trails, water, broadband, international nonstop flights and more Decreasing distracted driving by enacting a hands-free device driving law and making Indiana’s roads safer for all We couldn’t be more excited to work towards these goals and continue Putting People First in 2020. -Holcomb Crew Contributions by corporations and labor organizations are limited to $5,000 annually; contributions by individuals, LLCs and political committees are unlimited. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited. | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a3/3eb3e2fc/694207c2/744d1cd0/2208192865/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191210_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191210_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a3/3eb3e2fc/694207c2/744d1cdf/2208192865/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191210_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191210_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a3/3eb3e2fc/694207c2/744d1cde/2208192865/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191210_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191210_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

**Our focus right now:** We're about to enter the next phase of this election, where people across the country start caucusing and voting in the Democratic primary.

**The challenge:** Before that happens, our campaign has a big test: the final FEC deadline of the year on December 31.

**Why this deadline is important:** Our fundraising performance this quarter will have a huge impact on the investments we're able to make during this next critical phase. We need to reach as many voters and caucus-goers as possible by hosting town halls, knocking on doors, making phone calls and buying ads, and that work is only possible through grassroots donations we raise before the next FEC deadline.

**How you can help:** [**Will you donate $2 or anything you can right now to ensure that our campaign's budget is in a strong position as we begin 2020?**](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM38F_EGR_GOL_P_20191210_V1S2_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode=EMM38F_EGR_GOL_P_20191210_V1S2_P_T2)

subject: What my HBCU means to me

body:
| | | |

_Today, Tom is releasing his new policy for supporting Historically Black Colleges and Universities.[_Click here to read the policy now._](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU8HeJl5zVO4QT4JqcC-2FpD5bUCsmXQuCHqmsYVth4GvpewEI6PAlxqQBw8TnRznT0spAWQkBS8mFsaDHEhb728ZFO-2BUxcqZyZ48M4rhU6GsXWw4Ro19-2BpShRuqhEVSOTdwG1mLehJOJCUcGXvxaRNRrG84SchxA1J80C0Up6FHlhA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFcPj1dlzYnZZUcR0AiU2stCJ-2B3u7rQkNQWRAzp5EGC-2BIrD-2FgvZBQJCONxSpcmjH-2FtRQ8eTIzeOCGB2XmEq6z6oSbQfXVS6-2FeS2P1O4nUU9hkSztdGbA7zQi9r-2FP-2FeCvn3k0WMOi5PQ8kKUV4lBDWaW7fnnjsrZwh0U9tZ8zgMmcL-2BmTz30Thn8PURON6E7p7WzLRrJS1XbQGQuFF818RF-2BEIruaJRK-2FfraY0s2gCpafKRNGhf-2FUZ2Wp7OcZpcBuyvs6yqqfo70a5HE5tI0JxxcrYcVT6RnkXQg7fCD6r-2Be5n-2Bfsfr9FvjaH4Us6pT1Py5P-2BCFuEs9AbEgrm4brZqUOR)_ Hi, there — My name is Jeremiah, and I’m Tom’s Social Impact Director. As a proud graduate of an HBCU, it is my absolute privilege to tell you about [_**Tom’s new policy for Historically Black Colleges and Universities that will impact the lives of countless young minds and underserved communities**_.](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU8HeJl5zVO4QT4JqcC-2FpD5bUCsmXQuCHqmsYVth4GvpewEI6PAlxqQBw8TnRznT0spAWQkBS8mFsaDHEhb728ZFO-2BUxcqZyZ48M4rhU6GsXWw4Ro19-2BpShRuqhEVSOTdwG1mLehJOJCUcGXvxaRNRrG84SchxA1J80C0Up6FHlhA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFcPj1dlzYnZZUcR0AiU2stCJ-2B3u7rQkNQWRAzp5EGC-2BIrD-2FgvZBQJCONxSpcmjH-2FtRQ8eTIzeOCGB2XmEq6z6oSbQfXVS6-2FeS2P1O4nUU9hkSztdGbA7zQi9r-2FP-2FeCvn3lksdFIhttQwRZhWUGXc0jCPIIpWztvyR2GxuOlpzvLmbv5NLfUgEcgBp1ccIYb0MyNtrwLfHQkyafxNs71-2FTeSMJzFX5ooI1TYgepUhMoeMNPF-2FcXsbF3fAZD3Jo9b9qpxLdKsk2xxXfKcqZeiQwvJufWngf35GGoB-2Fy5cFI-2F2dhwHv3-2FPWqsbdgqTYqnIuX-2BzAvn9STXxgWEYeG3rYcpt) Tom and I have been working together to support HBCUs for the past two years. In 2018, Tom invested $1 million through the #BlackLivesRising program that focused on registering, training, and providing paid opportunities for HBCU students. This work helped inform the powerful HBCU platform I’m excited to share with you today. I’m particularly excited to share some highlights from our plan:
* $125 billion investment
* HBCU innovation centers and community impact partnerships
* Full support of HBCU legislation and leadership

As a first-generation college student, I suffered from a lack of opportunities, struggled to pay my rent, and often went hungry because of the financial difficulties many HBCU students like me endure. As a proud alumnus of Johnson C. Smith University, an HBCU serving the African American community since 1867, I made a pledge to fight for students like myself and have advocated for HBCUs throughout my career because they’re an important pipeline for African American success. Tom’s got a solid plan to support HBCUs. [_**Take a minute to read it today, and join me in supporting Tom’s plan for ensuring a stable and thriving future for HBCUs.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU8HeJl5zVO4QT4JqcC-2FpD5bUCsmXQuCHqmsYVth4GvpewEI6PAlxqQBw8TnRznT0spAWQkBS8mFsaDHEhb728ZFO-2BUxcqZyZ48M4rhU6GsXWw4Ro19-2BpShRuqhEVSOTdwG1mLehJOJCUcGXvxaRNRrG84SchxA1J80C0Up6FHlhA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFcPj1dlzYnZZUcR0AiU2stCJ-2B3u7rQkNQWRAzp5EGC-2BIrD-2FgvZBQJCONxSpcmjH-2FtRQ8eTIzeOCGB2XmEq6z6oSbQfXVS6-2FeS2P1O4nUU9hkSztdGbA7zQi9r-2FP-2FeCvn3mqE8KkACGKSb8-2B-2FdUsR6Cpz3olTFU2RAWS6eap0y7b87sdbEI0ibjcHvxoQzw6clRvCo0Ej2vF8UeIyBuCt6X0qL75tMSg6n3VVScCQpPbRrLA3iJclvLREKG5qubGadDG88dbNTWeZaRFyyqGIuA-2BbC0KpvzcOLJvp8i22b9W6VppDA8nrr0cBrloemkHw2Jq0SX3ybTcuOKTYxM79XsY) Go JCSU Bulls!
Jeremiah

Jeremiah Chapman (JCSU ‘11)
Social Impact Director
Tom 2020

name: Michelle (finance update)
subject: We're short of our goal, but there's still time to hit it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
I wanted to give you an update on our end of year fundraising campaign.
|
---

| | I wanted to give you an update on our end of year fundraising campaign, friends. **The bad news:** We're still $9,453 short of our grassroots fundraising goal with 21 days left in the month. **The good news:** We need to raise just $450 a day, every day, for the rest of the month to hit our goal. **[Can you rush a donation to help us reach our one-day fundraising goal?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff092/522d4087/7afc4323/4f341730/580054980/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191210_em_fr_nd_bythenumbers_l1")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[Rush a $10 donation](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff092/522d4087/7afc4323/4f34172f/580054980/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20191210_em_fr_nd_bythenumbers_btn_ex_10&amounts=10,25,39,50,100,250,500")**
---
**[Rush a $25 donation](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff092/522d4087/7afc4323/4f34172e/580054980/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20191210_em_fr_nd_bythenumbers_btn_ex_25&amounts=10,25,39,50,100,250,500")**
---
**[Rush a $39 donation](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff092/522d4087/7afc4323/4f34172d/580054980/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=39&refcode=20191210_em_fr_nd_bythenumbers_btn_ex_39&amounts=10,25,39,50,100,250,500")**
---
**[Chip in another amount](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff092/522d4087/7afc4323/4f34172c/580054980/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191210_em_fr_nd_bythenumbers_btn_ex_other&amounts=10,25,39,50,100,250,500")**
---
Our next big fundraising deadline is December 31st at midnight.
From there, we submit a fundraising and spending report to the Federal Election Commission. On January 15, our financial information will be public for everyone -- including our opponent -- to see.
People will be looking at that report to see if we have strong grassroots support and if we were able to outraise our opponent.
[**So, if you can, make your first contribution right now to help us hit our grassroots fundraising goal.**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff092/522d4087/7afc4323/4f34172b/580054980/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191210_em_fr_nd_bythenumbers_l2")
Thanks for all you do,
Michelle Fowler
Finance Team
|
---

---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217

Peter —

This week, our campaign is reviewing our FINAL 2019 Supporter Records.

We’ve told you how important that online grassroots contributions are to electing Democrat Kim Mangone -- _we couldn’t afford our campaign operations without you!_

But we’ve run into a serious problem...

[**Donations this month have slowed down to a painful crawl.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12735433/131385577/10128690?refcode=20191210-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-ACND&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=31aaca8e-bf1b-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWFhY2E4ZS1iZjFiLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uem07kXePzCB3MPK24g5ArjNqoDnM-TpES5eTv2562w=)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: BREAKING: Supreme Court allows abortion ultrasound law to go into effect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | The Supreme Court, led by Trump's hand-picked, anti-choice justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh, rejected a challenge to a Kentucky law requiring doctors to perform ultrasounds and play a fetal heartbeat to those seeking abortions. This comes on the heels of SCOTUS announcing it will review a Louisiana abortion case this spring \-- meaning they could undo Roe v. Wade in the next few months. This is a dream scenario for the GOP \-- they've been appointing anti-choice judges and campaigning hard on removing your right to make decisions about your body. We're ready to take them on, but we can't do it alone. We need engaged Democrats to stand up with us. If that sounds like you, please tell us: **Should Democrats defend the right to choose?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcaa/6e9863e8/17095647/1db0bae2/2670914776/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Fy0B1Zvw") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcaa/6e9863e8/17095647/1db0bae2/2670914776/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Fy0B1Zvw") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcaa/6e9863e8/17095647/1db0bae5/2670914776/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191210c.ND&refcode2=MLoPsUN2V0PjXEulfMp0")

name: Zach Graumann
subject: December Debate Status: Qualified!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
It was because of the Yang Gang that we hit this milestone -- and it will be up to the Yang Gang to keep us powering through to Super Tuesday.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4588%2E377263%2EiyyK3o) **Qualified for December Debate? YES**

✅ 200,000 unique donors
✅ Poll 1: CNN New Hampshire
✅ Poll 2: Quinnipiac New Hampshire
✅ Poll 3: Quinnipiac South Carolina
✅ Poll 4: Quinnipiac University NATIONAL

[ Pitch in now to celebrate our win and keep us on the rise. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19511?t=5&akid=4588%2E377263%2EiyyK3o) Yang Gang --

**We just hit the final poll needed to qualify for the December debate! Quinnipiac released a new poll today showing Andrew with 4% support NATIONALLY.**

That’s right, we’re now six for six in DNC Democratic debates.

I just told Andrew and he got choked up talking about the power of the Yang Gang. He is humbled by each and every one of you.

[But we can’t take our feet off the gas. Not even for a minute. The Iowa caucuses are less than two months away. Chip in $10 or more right now and keep the momentum going. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19511?t=13&akid=4588%2E377263%2EiyyK3o) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19511?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4588%2E377263%2EiyyK3o)

---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19511?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4588%2E377263%2EiyyK3o)

| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19511?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4588%2E377263%2EiyyK3o)
---

---
Qualifying for the December debate proves a lot about this campaign.

It proves that we are in this for the long haul. It proves we are not slowing down. It proves we are the team that is going to get Andrew to the White House.

It’s because of the Yang Gang that we hit this milestone -- and it will be up to the Yang Gang to keep us powering through to Super Tuesday.

This is not the time to slow down. We have to keep this campaign running in high gear.

[Let’s show everyone that we’re not slowing down, Yang Gang, and send $10 or more to keep our momentum up. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19511?t=6&akid=4588%2E377263%2EiyyK3o)
[Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19511?t=15&akid=4588%2E377263%2EiyyK3o)
---
Let’s not lose sight of our ultimate goal. Our work isn’t finished until Andrew becomes the Democratic nominee and beats Trump in 2020.

Let’s keep it up, Yang Gang, and win this whole thing!

Zach Graumann
Campaign Manager

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Selling tear gas and rubber bullets to the Hong Kong police? Not so fast.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c47b/6cd27893/52aa64a0/1587a3d2/1054319624/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | State-sponsored violence. Human rights abuses. Peaceful protests met with force. That's what people living in Hong Kong are facing as they fight for a democratic future. Many of us have spoken out in favor of the Hong Kong protestors. But we can and must do more. We must ensure that America does not enable or empower the police force in Hong Kong to oppress this pro-democracy movement. That's why I led a bipartisan charge in the Senate to ensure that no one in the United States is allowed to sell tear gas, pepper spray, rubber bullets, and other crowd control equipment to the police force in Hong Kong. See a problem. Take a stand. Bring people together. Get it done. That is what public service should be about. And it's why it's my privilege to serve the people of Oregon in the U.S. Senate. Onward, **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c47b/6cd27893/52aa64a0/1587a3d3/1054319624/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-12-10-hkop&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c47b/6cd27893/52aa64a0/1587a3d0/1054319624/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-12-10-hkop&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c47b/6cd27893/52aa64a0/1587a3d1/1054319624/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-12-10-hkop&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c47b/6cd27893/52aa64a0/1587a3ce/1054319624/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-12-10-hkop&refcode2=express-buttons")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8a4/3eb3e2fc/694787b2/744d1fc8/1274470797/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191210_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191210_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Tell Governor Cuomo: We Need Representation in Washington, D.C.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,

Today, the House Democrats completed a process they began the night President Trump won the 2016 election. With no legitimate proof of wrongdoing, Democrats have simply filled in the blanks with their Articles of Impeachment. They started out with an assumption of guilt and used a jury of the president's enemies to get where they wanted.

Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and House Democrats know they can't beat our president at the ballot box, and now they have demonstrated that they will do whatever it takes to undo the will of the American people. We have to stand by our president. We want to [**defend him**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=d1c87ea987&e=9f843ba602). We need to [**defend him**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=56b45eabb7&e=9f843ba602)**. **Now, more than ever, the 27th Congressional District needs a conservative, battle-tested patriot to join President Trump in this fight.

But Western New Yorkers are without a congressional representative because Governor Cuomo refuses to call a special election.

Sign and share [**our petition**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=2a56080244&e=9f843ba602) and tell the governor that [**we deserve a voice**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=9c743a1e27&e=9f843ba602) on the most important issue facing our country.

Faithfully Yours,
Rob Ortt

p.s. – Please stand with me and President Trump [**TODAY!**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=731840d4c8&e=9f843ba602)

subject: NEW: President Trump keeps his promise to fix NAFTA!
body:
President Donald J. Trump has fought for better trade deals for American workers since his first day in office. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=682335ae82&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 10, 2019
---
| | |
# **NEW: President Trump keeps his promise to fix NAFTA!**

**President Donald J. Trump** has fought for better trade deals for American workers since his first day in office. In addition to new agreements with Japan, South Korea, and the European Union, the President has long argued that NAFTA must be reformed.

**More than a year ago** , he kept that signature campaign promise when he signed a modern, rebalanced trade deal with Canada and Mexico. And today, after a year’s worth of stall tactics, House Democrats have finally acquiesced to the will of the American people and agreed to vote on the new United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement (USMCA).

**That’s big news**. It's time for Washington to put American workers first and get USMCA over the finish line!

**When President Trump took office,** he inherited all sorts of poorly negotiated trade deals that heavily favored global competitors over American citizens. Of all the agreements that put U.S. workers and businesses at a disadvantage, undoubtedly the biggest culprit was the outdated, deficient NAFTA.

**For years** , NAFTA rules have helped incentivize offshoring, which led to manufacturing jobs leaving the United States in bulk. As a result, politicians from both parties have called to reform our trade terms with Mexico and Canada ever since the deal first passed in the mid-1990s. As usual, Washington promised voters one thing and then did another.

**It took President Trump** to get Mexico and Canada to sign a new deal. Here are just a few ways it updates and improves NAFTA:
* **Auto and manufacturing** : With new rules of origin, 75 percent of auto content must be produced in North America, stimulating U.S. vehicle and parts production.

* **Labor protections:** Unlike NAFTA, labor rules are enforceable, not voluntary. Workers will benefit from provisions that incentivize the use of high-wage manufacturing labor—supporting better jobs for _American_ workers.

* **Digital trade:** USMCA includes the strongest terms on digital trade—a booming and growing sector of the U.S. economy—of any trade deal. NAFTA had none.

* **Farmers and ranchers:** In just one example, USMCA protects our farmers by eliminating a loophole that allowed Canada to undersell American dairy products.

**In short, Main Street won.** Democrat leaders tried to stall, desperate to avoid giving President Trump a signature win on one of his core issues. But USMCA highlighted the divide between far-left Washington partisans and practical, results-minded local officials who supported the deal. In the end, a growing chorus of diverse voices—everyone from labor leaders to small business owners—finally forced Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s hand.

**USMCA is a promise kept** to America’s working class. For that, we should all celebrate.

[Something to share: President Trump has fought for better deals since day one!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42b010c9a0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **House Democrats make their 3-year impeachment scheme official**

**The Swamp outdid themselves** today, surprising no one that Washington can always find a way to stoop lower than ever before. At a time when Congress’ approval rating is mired in the low 20s, House Democrats announced they will proceed with a partisan impeachment of President Trump—despite finding no evidence of criminal wrongdoing.

**White House Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham** issued the following statement in part to reporters today:
| | _House Democrats have long wanted to overturn the votes of 63 million Americans. They have determined that they must impeach President Trump because they cannot legitimately defeat him at the ballot box. The Democrats’ use of a phone call with the president of Ukraine – with a transcript the President himself released – served as their excuse for this partisan, gratuitous, and pathetic attempt to overthrow the Trump Administration and the results of the 2016 election.

The announcement of two baseless articles of impeachment does not hurt the President, it hurts the American people, who expect their elected officials to work on their behalf to strengthen our Nation. The President will address these false charges in the Senate and expects to be fully exonerated, because he did nothing wrong.

Ultimately, Speaker Pelosi and House Democrats will have to answer to their constituents for manufacturing an impeachment inquiry and forcing unfounded accusations down the throats of the American people. _ |
---|---|---

[“IG Report Confirms Schiff FISA Memo Media Praised Was Riddled With Lies”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5db20b91c5&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:**[Top Ukraine official casts doubt on key impeachment testimony](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87173a0b01&e=3ee4985eea)

|
---
|
